1502100045.english: I turned away from the voice speaking to me, closed my eyes again, and waited to get used to the light.
1502100045.korean: - 나는 말을 거는 목소리를 뒤로하고 다시 눈을 감아 빛에 익숙해지기를 기다렸다.

1502100046.english: As I closed my eyes and heightened my senses, something warm covered my body, and I felt someone stroking my hair.
1502100046.korean: - 눈을 감고 신경을 곤두세우자 몸에는 따뜻한 무언가를 덮었고, 누군가 내 머리칼을 손으로 어루만져지는 느낌이 들었다.

1502100047.english: And when I opened my eyes again, what was before my eyes was…
1502100047.korean: - 그리고 다시 눈을 떴을 때 내 눈앞에 있는 것은…

1502100049.english: - Why? Why are those huge breasts right in front of my eyes...?
1502100049.korean: - 왜지? 왜 커다란 가슴이 내 눈앞에…?

1502100050.english: This isn't going to work. No matter how much I think about it, I don't understand what's going on. I've just woken up, so my mind isn't working properly.
1502100050.korean: - 안 되겠다. 아무리 생각해도 영문을 모르겠다.&n막 정신이 깨어난 참이라 머리가 제대로 돌아가지 않는다.

1502100051.english: Hmm, does it really matter? As long as my chest is right in front of me, it’s fine anyway.
1502100051.korean: - 음, 아무래도 좋나? 가슴이 눈앞에 있으면 아무튼 좋은 거지.

1502100053.english: To think the first word I uttered as soon as I came to my senses was 'heart.'
1502100053.korean: 정신을 차리자마자 뱉는 첫 마디가 가슴이라니.

1502100054.english: I had a feeling, but that reaction... looking at it, it's obvious.
1502100054.korean: 짐작은 하고 있었지만, 그 반응... 보아하니 뻔하군.

1502100055.english: I'm talking about the kind of life you're living in Orca.
1502100055.korean: 네 녀석이 오르카에서 어떤 생활을 보내고 있는지 말이야.

1502100056.english: As I listened to the voice laughing as if happy, my mind gradually cleared, and my blurry vision began to become sharp.
1502100056.korean: - 즐겁다는 듯이 웃는 목소리를 들으며 나의 정신은 조금씩 맑아졌고, 흐릿한 시야도 차츰 선명하게 보이기 시작했다.

1502100057.english: - When I closed and opened my eyes one last time, before me was…
1502100057.korean: - 마지막으로 다시 눈을 감고 뜨자 그 앞에는…

1502100059.english: Have you finally come to your senses? Orca's Commander?
1502100059.korean: 이제 제대로 정신을 차렸나? 오르카의 사령관?

1502100060.english: I was worried about how we would hold the funeral if he/she didn't open his/her eyes, so I'm relieved that it didn't become a hassle.
1502100060.korean: 이대로 눈을 뜨지 않으면 어떻게 장례를 치러야 하나 고민 중이었는데,&n귀찮게 되지 않아서 다행이야.

1502100062.english: - Memory… Right, I was definitely being chased by Iron Bugs.
1502100062.korean: - 기억… 그래, 분명 나는 철충에게 쫓기고 있었다.

1502100063.english: Then Gamma appeared and saved me... and after that...
1502100063.korean: - 그러다가 감마가 나타나 나를 구해줬고… 그 후에는…

1502100064.english: I don't see that connector Iron Bug here either. I really don't like how it keeps scurrying around hiding and just waiting for an opportunity.
1502100064.korean: 여기에도 그 연결체 철충은 보이지 않는군.&n계속 쫄랑쫄랑 모습을 숨기면서 기회만 엿보는 게 아주 마음에 안들어.

1502100065.english: It's clear they're aiming for something against me.
1502100065.korean: 나를 향해 뭔가를 노리고 있는 건 확실한데 말이야.

1502100066.english: That is what we should be saying. Orca's Commander.

1502100067.english: Why are you on the Northern Front? And on top of that, you're being chased by Iron Bugs all alone.
1502100067.korean: 네 녀석이 어째서 북부 전선에 있는 거지?&n게다가 혼자 철충에게 쫓기고 말이야.

1502100068.english: Where are the other Orca guys or the boring bodyguard who just stands there glaring?
1502100068.korean: 다른 오르카 녀석들이나 늘 옆에서 째려보기만 하는 재미없는 경호원은 어디 있지?

1502100069.english: Just then, the ground suddenly shook, and a loud roar began to be heard from a distance.
1502100069.korean: - 그때 갑자기 지면이 흔들리며 멀리서부터 큰 굉음이 들리기 시작했다.

1502100070.english: Hmm, it looks like an avalanche might have occurred from the shock of wiping out the Iron Bugs a moment ago.
1502100070.korean: 흠, 조금 전에 철충들을 쓸어버린 충격으로 눈사태라도 일어났나 보군.

1502100071.english: If you don't hurry and take refuge in a safe place, a snowdrift will soon engulf this place, Commander of Orca.
1502100071.korean: 서둘러 안전한 곳으로 피하지 않으면 눈더미가 곧 여기를 덮칠 거다 오르카의 사령관.

1502100072.english: At that moment, fatigue and helplessness overwhelmed me all at once, and I collapsed helplessly onto the floor.
1502100072.korean: - 그때 피로감과 무력감이 한꺼번에 몰려왔고 나는 힘 없이 바닥에 쓰러졌다.

1502100073.english: I had been holding on, dragging my body frozen by the cold weather and fatigue accumulated from continuous strenuous activity, but it seemed I had reached my limit.
1502100073.korean: - 계속된 격한 움직임으로 누적된 피로와 추운 날씨에 얼어붙은 몸을 이끌고 계속해서 버텨왔지만,&n이제 한계에 도달한 것 같았다.

1502100074.english: And so, I slowly lost consciousness.

1502100076.english: If you look only at the results, does it turn out that way?

1502100077.english: I've already paid off the debt from last time, so there isn't really any reason for me to save you, but on the other hand, there isn't really any reason not to save you either.
1502100077.korean: 지난번의 일로 빚은 갚았으니 딱히 널 구해줄 이유는 없지만,&n반대로 딱히 널 구하지 않을 이유도 없어서 말이야.

1502100078.english: I thought it wouldn't be a bad idea to take this opportunity to make him take on new debt.
1502100078.korean: 이참에 새로운 빚을 지게 만드는 것도 나쁘지 않겠다고 생각했지.

1502100079.english: Looking around, it seemed like we were inside a small cave.
1502100079.korean: - 주위를 둘러보자 여기는 작은 동굴 안인 듯싶었다.

1502100080.english: A bonfire was burning nearby, and the coat Gamma always wore was covering my body.
1502100080.korean: - 가까운 옆에는 모닥불이 피워져 있었고, 내 몸 위에는 감마가 늘 입고 있던 코트가 덮여 있었다.

1502100081.english: Your body was as cold as ice after you lost consciousness.
1502100081.korean: 정신을 잃은 네 몸이 얼음장처럼 차가웠거든.

1502100082.english: Since you are a reinforced human who has been treated with Origin Dust, you won't die this easily, but consider this my affection.
1502100082.korean: 너도 오리진 더스트를 시술한 강화 인간이니 이 정도로 쉽게 죽지는 않겠지만,&n이건 내 애정이라 생각하라고.

1502100083.english: Of course. All bioroids are built to have affection for humans, after all. Do you think I'd be an exception?
1502100083.korean: 그야 물론이지. 모든 바이오로이드는 인간에게 애정을 갖도록 만들어지니까.&n나라고 예외겠어?

1502100084.english: There are sometimes cases where people have a very twisted affection like Delta, though.
1502100084.korean: 가끔 델타처럼 많이 삐뚤어진 애정을 갖는 경우도 있지만 말이야.

1502100085.english: Or what is it, Orca's commander?

1502100086.english: Did you perhaps prefer being pressed close naked and having me warm your cold body directly? Huh? Tell me honestly.
1502100086.korean: 혹시 알몸으로 밀착해서 차가운 몸을 직접 데워주는 쪽이 더 좋았나?&n응? 솔직하게 말해보라고.

1502100087.english: Haha, I was just joking about glaring. Don't worry, I didn't really touch you while you were unconscious.
1502100087.korean: 하핫, 노려보기는 농담이야.&n안심하라고 네가 정신을 잃었던 동안 딱히 몸에 손대지는 않았으니까.

1502100088.english: Well, it seems like the body is really asserting itself regardless of his own will.
1502100088.korean: 뭐, 본인의 의지와 상관없이 몸쪽은 열심히 자기주장을 하는 모양이지만.

1502100089.english: Gamma said that and turned his gaze to something in the lower half of my body.
1502100089.korean: - 감마는 그렇게 말하며 시선을 내 몸 하반신의 무언가로 향했다.

1502100090.english: have nothing to say, even if it is a natural phenomenon…
1502100090.korean: - 아무리 자연 현상이라고 해도 할 말이 없다…

1502100091.english: Heh heh, the last human male. Surrounded only by bioroids that follow him.
1502100091.korean: 크큭, 마지막 인간 남성.&n주위에는 자기를 따르는 바이오로이드뿐.

1502100092.english: I understand. You must be having a very enjoyable life in Orca.
1502100092.korean: 이해는 해, 아주 즐거운 오르카 생활을 보내고 있겠지.

1502100093.english: How was it? Did you try it with the dragon too?

1502100094.english: Haha! That reaction! Interesting! To think that dragon would show a disheveled look on the bed!
1502100094.korean: 하핫! 그 반응! 흥미로운데!&n그 용이 침대 위에서 흐트러진 모습을 보여준다라!

1502100095.english: I really want to see it at least once if possible! Hehe!
1502100095.korean: 가능하면 한 번쯤 꼭 보고 싶군! 크크!

1502100096.english: Alright then, let's stop the joking around...
1502100096.korean: 자, 그럼 장난은 여기까지 하도록 하고…

1502100097.english: I don't know the details, but from the looks of it, it doesn't seem like a good situation.
1502100097.korean: 자세한 건 모르겠지만, 보아하니 그리 좋은 상황은 아닌 것 같군.

1502100098.english: Well, the same goes for this side, though.

1502100099.english: How about it? Since we're in the same predicament, why don't we try joining forces?
1502100099.korean: 어때? 서로 같은 상황에 놓인 처지끼리 힘이라도 합쳐보는 게?

1502100101.english: Hmm, is that really that surprising? We've fought alongside that dragon countless times already, too.
1502100101.korean: 흠, 그게 그렇게 놀랄 일인가?&n용 녀석과도 지금까지 수도 없이 함께 싸웠다만?

1502100102.english: I looked at the Gamma coat covering my body.
1502100102.korean: - 나는 내 몸에 덮인 감마의 코트를 바라봤다.

1502100104.english: Haha! Fine, fine. Try making my heart flutter like a dragon, Commander of Orca.
1502100104.korean: 하핫! 좋아, 좋아.&n어디 용처럼 날 한 번 설레게 해보라고 오르카의 사령관.

1502100105.english: Ah, but before that... right, I definitely have to ask this.
1502100105.korean: 아, 그전에 말이야… 그렇지, 이건 꼭 질문해야겠어.

1502100106.english: Commander, I don't care at all what kind of dissolute life you lead in Orca.
1502100106.korean: 사령관, 나는 네가 오르카에서 어떤 방탕한 생활을 하던 전혀 신경 쓰지 않아.

1502100107.english: It’s none of my business how he plays with that dragon guy, either.
1502100107.korean: 용 녀석과도 어떻게 놀던 내 알 바가 아니니깐.

1502100108.english: But… just in case… just in case…

1502100109.english: You didn't lay a hand on the little kid, did you?
1502100109.korean: 꼬맹이 녀석에게까지 손을 댄 건 아니겠지?

1502100110.english: I had to give a desperate explanation, using all my might, in response to Gamma's question.
1502100110.korean: - 나는 감마의 이 질문에 모든 전력을 다한 필사적인 해명을 해야 했다.

1502100115.english: This vibration and sound... surely not...

1502100116.english: If I don't get out of the way quickly…! Ugh…

1502100122.english: No, I didn't expect you to bring that up first.
1502100122.korean: 아니, 네 쪽에서 먼저 그런 이야기를 꺼낼 줄은 몰랐으니까.

1502100123.english: Haha, now that I think about it, that was true.

1502100124.english: Then, I look forward to working with you, Gamma.

1502200001.english: Hmm, so that's how it turned out. I roughly understand the situation.
1502200001.korean: 흠, 그렇게 된 건가.&n상황은 대강 이해했다.

1502200002.english: A few hours later, I had recovered enough to move without any problems.
1502200002.korean: - 몇 시간 후, 나는 움직이는 데 문제 없을 정도로 몸을 회복했고.

1502200003.english: - He told Gamma about the circumstances of how he came to the Northern Front, the attack by the Iron Bug, and the unknown attack that stopped the bioroids.
1502200003.korean: - 감마에게 북부 전선으로 오게 된 경위와 철충의 습격, 그리고 바이오로이드를 정지시키는 알 수 없는 공격을 당한 것을 이야기했다.

1502200004.english: That Rode bastard. I told him to contact Omega or Epsilon, but he contacted that little kid instead. I'll have to teach him a lesson when I see him later.
1502200004.korean: 로데 녀석, 오메가나 엡실론에게 연락하라고 했는데 꼬맹이 녀석에게 연락하고 말이야.&n나중에 만나면 벌을 좀 줘야겠군.

1502200005.english: Then you must have heard a rough explanation from Rhode, right? Poseidon's situation is similar to yours.
1502200005.korean: 그렇다면 로데에게 대략적인 설명은 들었겠지?&n포세이돈도 상황은 너희와 비슷해.

1502200006.english: The Annihilator was taken down by an attack that appeared to be a hack, and all AGSs being controlled by the ship control system were also disconnected.
1502200006.korean: 어나이얼레이터는 해킹으로 보이는 공격에 다운되고&n함선제어시스템으로 제어되고 있었던 AGS도 전부 연결이 끊어졌어.

1502200007.english: As if that weren't enough, those Iron Bug bastards even broke through the erosion immunity circuit and started infecting. Well, I did smash every single one of them to pieces, though.
1502200007.korean: 그것도 모자라 철충 녀석들은 침식면역회로를 뚫고 감염까지 시작하더군. &n뭐, 하나도 남김없이 모조리 박살 냈지만.

1502200008.english: In the meantime, I spotted an Iron Bug that looked like a connector, and when I tried to teach it a lesson, it ran away, so I chased after it.
1502200008.korean: 그러던 중 연결체로 보이는 철충을 발견했고, 손 좀 봐주려는데 도망을 치길래 쫓아갔지.

1502200009.english: I was chasing him around, smashing every Iron Bug I could see, when I found you, Commander.
1502200009.korean: 그렇게 녀석을 쫓아 눈에 보이는 철충들을 박살내고 돌아다니다가 사령관, 널 발견한 거다.

1502200010.english: Hmm? That's all. What do you mean by a different sign?

1502200011.english: Ah, I see~ You're wondering why I'm perfectly fine and didn't stop like the other bioroids even though I ran into a connector.
1502200011.korean: 아, 과연~&n연결체와 마주쳤는데 어째서 나는 다른 바이오로이드처럼 정지되지 않고 멀쩡한 건지 궁금한 거군.

1502200012.english: I'm sorry, but to start with the conclusion, I don't have any idea either.
1502200012.korean: 미안하지만, 결론부터 말하자면 나 역시 짐작 가는 게 없어.

1502200013.english: I didn't receive any particularly special attacks from him, nor did I take any notable defensive measures.
1502200013.korean: 녀석에게 특별하다고 할 만한 공격을 받지도 않았고,&n나 역시 이렇다 할 방어 수단을 취한 것도 아니거든.

1502200014.english: Well, maybe it's simply because you Orca guys lacked discipline. Haha, the Dragon seems to have gotten quite lax compared to before, too.
1502200014.korean: 뭐, 단순하게 너희 오르카 녀석들이 기합이 부족했기 때문이라는 이유일지도 모르지.&n하핫, 용 녀석도 예전에 비해 많이 해이해진 것 같고.

1502200015.english: Hmm, but if even the dragon was completely helpless, that would be quite disappointing.
1502200015.korean: 흠, 그런데 만약 용까지 꼼짝없이 당했다면 그건 좀 많이 실망인데.

1502200016.english: - You're saying it's really because of such a simple reason?

1502200017.english: No, that can't be true. The way Ferro looked back then was clearly under the influence of something.
1502200017.korean: - 아니, 그럴 리가 없어. 그때 보았던 페로의 모습은 명백히 무언가의 영향을 받은 모습이었어.

1502200018.english: Hypnosis? A form of brainwashing like in Paradise? No, when we scouted with the advance unit, there weren't any large-scale hologram facilities or devices here like there were back then.
1502200018.korean: - 최면? 낙원 때와 같은 세뇌의 일종?&n아니야, 선발 부대로 정찰했을 때는 이곳에 그때와 같은 대규모 홀로그램 시설이나 장치 같은 건 없었어.

1502200019.english: Or maybe module hacking like Alpha or Beta? But Ferro hasn't been subjected to any significant attacks. Could it be that he can be subdued even without direct contact?
1502200019.korean: - 아니면 알파나 베타와 같은 모듈 해킹? 하지만 페로는 이렇다 할만한 공격을 받지 않았는데?&n설마 직접적인 접촉이 없더라도 제압할 수 있는 건가?

1502200020.english: Then why isn't it affected Gamma? Is it because it's lemonade? Or because it has Kestos Himas?
1502200020.korean: - 그렇다면 왜 감마에게는 영향이 없지? 레모네이드라서?&n아니면 케스토스 히마스를 가지고 있으니까?

1502200021.english: - ...It won't work. I don't have enough information right now to make a judgment. Even so, I can't make a rash move in this situation…
1502200021.korean: - ...안 되겠어, 판단하기에는 지금 가진 정보가 너무 부족해.&n그렇다고 이 상황에서 섣불리 움직일 수는…

1502200023.english: It's nothing. It's just that your troubled face is quite a sight to behold, Commander of Orca. Come to think of it, this is the first time I've seen you look so anxious.
1502200023.korean: 별거 아니야, 그저 고민에 빠진 네 얼굴이 볼만해서 말이야, 오르카의 사령관.&n생각해 보니 그런 초조한 얼굴을 보는 건 이번이 처음이군.

1502200024.english: It's obvious what you're agonizing over. You must be thinking about the enemy's capabilities and how to get out of this situation.
1502200024.korean: 뭘 그렇게 고민하고 있는지는 뻔하지.&n적의 능력이 무엇이고 이 상황을 빠져나갈 방법을 생각하고 있겠지.

1502200025.english: But the way I see it, it doesn't seem like there is a suitable method right now. Am I wrong?
1502200025.korean: 하지만 내가 보기에 현재로서는 마땅한 방법은 없는 거 같은데?&n틀리나?

1502200026.english: Haha, seeing as there is no answer, I guess I hit the nail on the head.
1502200026.korean: 하핫, 대답이 없는 걸 보니 정곡을 찔렀나 보군.

1502200027.english: I know your leadership skills are exceptional. However, when you can't see the answer, tackling it head-on is one way to go.
1502200027.korean: 너의 지휘 능력이 대단하다는 건 알고 있어.&n하지만, 답이 보이지 않을 때는 일단 직접 부딪혀 보는 것도 하나의 방법이야.

1502200028.english: I mean that crazy confidence of charging forward without fear. Sometimes, that really can be effective.
1502200028.korean: 겁내지 않고 앞을 향해 나아가는 광기 어린 자신감 말이야.&n때로는 그게 정말로 효과적일 때도 있지.

1502200029.english: And the version of you I know is capable of doing something like that, isn't he?
1502200029.korean: 그리고 내가 알고 있는 너라면 그런 게 가능한 녀석이잖아?

1502200030.english: Even when you were secretly taking refugees out of Vancouver Island, you came all the way to the operation zone yourself. And you confidently accepted my handshake, too.
1502200030.korean: 밴쿠버섬에서 오메가 몰래 난민들을 빼갈 때도 너는 직접 작전 구역까지 찾아왔지.&n내가 청한 악수도 당당하게 받고 말이야.

1502200031.english: That was the first time I thought you were a funny person.
1502200031.korean: 나는 그때 처음으로 너를 재미있는 인간이라고 생각했다.

1502200032.english: And when the ceasefire agreement was mentioned, I don't know what Beta told him, but he came to Caracas in person then as well.
1502200032.korean: 그리고 휴전 협정 얘기가 나왔을 때도 베타에게 무슨 얘기를 들었는지 모르겠지만, 그때도 직접 카라카스로 찾아왔고.

1502200033.english: It was the same when I visited Malta a while ago regarding the little one.
1502200033.korean: 얼마 전 꼬맹이 건으로 내가 몰타에 찾아갔을 때도 마찬가지야.

1502200034.english: I hesitate to say this myself, but isn't it difficult to stand confidently in front of me? At least among humans so far, there has been no one other than our Chairman.
1502200034.korean: 내가 직접 말하기는 뭐하지만, 내 앞에서 당당하게 서 있기란 쉽지 않다고?&n적어도 지금까지 인간 중에는 우리 회장님 말고는 아무도 없었다.

1502200035.english: Whenever other people saw me, they were always busy running away without looking back.
1502200035.korean: 다른 인간들은 나만 보면 언제나 뒤도 안 돌아보고 도망치기 바빴지.

1502200036.english: In contrast, Commander, you always faced challenges confidently without avoiding them.
1502200036.korean: 그에 비해 사령관, 너는 언제나 피하지 않고 당당하게 맞섰다.

1502200037.english: That might be why I became interested in you.
1502200037.korean: 그렇기 때문에 나는 너에게 흥미가 생겼을지도 몰라.

1502200039.english: Hmm? What's with that sour look?

1502200040.english: - Did Gamma just give a compliment in his own way?
1502200040.korean: - 지금... 감마 나름의 칭찬을 한 건가?

1502200041.english: I've gone on a bit long, but here's the point.

1502200042.english: I'm saying let's not waste time worrying about useless things and just try doing something for now.
1502200042.korean: 쓸데없는 고민으로 시간 낭비 하지 말고, 일단은 뭐라도 해보자는 거지.

1502200043.english: Haha, then there's no problem, right? Because I'm right here.
1502200043.korean: 하핫, 그럼 문제없잖아?&n지금 여기에 내가 있으니까.

1502200044.english: Now, Commander, go ahead and use me to your heart's content. You think opportunities like this don't come often?
1502200044.korean: 자, 사령관 어디 마음껏 날 이용해 봐.&n이런 기회 흔치 않다고?

1502200045.english: Is it like saying that when the answer isn't in sight, you just have to dive in headfirst...
1502200045.korean: - 답이 보이지 않을 때는 일단 직접 부딪혀 본다 인가…

1502200046.english: That might definitely be the best option right now...

1502200047.english: If any more time passes, the situation will only get worse... and above all, the chances of rescuing the paralyzed Orca members will decrease.
1502200047.korean: - 이 이상 시간이 지체되면 상황이 더 나빠질 뿐이고...&n무엇보다 멈춰버린 오르카 대원들을 구조할 확률이 낮아진다.

1502200049.english: Good, that’s exactly how it should be! I told you, you’re my favorite person!
1502200049.korean: 좋아, 그렇게 나와야지!&n역시 내가 제일 좋아하는 인간이라니깐!

1502200050.english: Then let's see! Let's see just how wild you can make me go!
1502200050.korean: 그러면 어디 확인해보자고!&n네가 얼마나 나를 날뛰게 해줄 수 있을지!

1502200051.english: You met the Nexus Iron Bug in person?

1502200052.english: Were there any other signs at that time?

1502200055.english: What do you want to say?

1502200057.english: Gamma, you're the only one capable of that.
1502200057.korean: 그런 게 가능한 건 감마, 너 정도뿐이야.

1502200058.english: Alright, Gamma. I’ll go along with that opinion.

1502300001.english: Alright! Bring it on! This isn't enough to get me fired up!
1502300001.korean: 자아! 어서 덤벼!&n이 정도로는 날 불타오르게 할 수 없다고!

1502300003.english: Where are you looking! It's over here!

1502300006.english: Hmm, well, is that roughly it?

1502300007.english: Having decided to move on after the night passed, we exited the cave and finished a battle with a swarm of Iron Bugs we encountered.
1502300007.korean: - 밤이 지나 우선 움직이기로 정한 우리는 동굴을 빠져나왔고, 마주친 철충의 무리와 한 차례의 전투가 끝났다.

1502300008.english: I knew it, but seeing Lemonade Gamma's combat power firsthand was beyond my imagination.
1502300008.korean: - 알고는 있었지만, 직접 본 레모네이드 감마의 전투력은 상상 이상이었다.

1502300009.english: Just as he had dodged Lilith's bullets right in front of his eyes in the past, he lightly dodged the Iron Bug's attacks, and his massive gauntlet fist easily and mercilessly shattered the Iron Bug.
1502300009.korean: - 예전 리리스의 총알을 눈앞에서 피했던 것처럼 철충의 공격을 가볍게 피했고,&n거대한 건틀릿 주먹은 철충을 쉽게 그리고 무참히 박살을 냈다.

1502300010.english: While Alpha and Beta rendered enemy modules combat-incapable by eroding them, Gamma shattered the enemy into pieces with sheer destructive power, as if such troublesome work were unnecessary.
1502300010.korean: - 알파와 베타가 적의 모듈을 침식해 전투 불능으로 만든다면,&n감마는 그런 번거로운 작업은 필요 없다는 듯이 오로지 순수한 파괴력으로 적을 산산조각 냈다.

1502300011.english: - ...But that occasional unstable movement… what is it? It sounds a bit creaky?
1502300011.korean: - ...하지만 간혹 보이는 저 불안정한 움직임은… 뭐지? 조금 삐걱거리는 것 같은데?

1502300013.english: - According to Rode, Gamma has been fighting the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) continuously from a few days before we came to the northern front until now.
1502300013.korean: - 로데의 말에 따르면 감마는 우리가 북부 전선에 오기 며칠 전부터 지금까지, 계속 철충과 싸우고 있다는 게 된다.

1502300014.english: Even if Gamma is a Lemonade model, and specifically a model specialized for combat, I don't think it can withstand continuous battles like this forever.
1502300014.korean: - 아무리 감마가 레모네이드 기종, 그중에서도 전투에 특화된 기종이라 할지라도 이렇게 계속된 전투를 언제까지나 버틸 수 있을 거라 생각되진 않는다.

1502300015.english: Oh dear, I guess I look quite ridiculous.
1502300015.korean: 이런 이런, 나도 참 우습게 보이는 모양이군.

1502300016.english: Worry about yourself instead of worrying about me, Commander of Orca. Do you think I would get tired of mere Iron Bugs?
1502300016.korean: 내 걱정을 할 시간에 네 걱정이나 하라고 오르카의 사령관.&n내가 고작 철충 녀석들 따위에 지칠 거라 생각하나?

1502300017.english: I could do this all day long, even when sparring with that dragon. This is nothing to me.
1502300017.korean: 용 녀석과 대련 할 때도 하루 종일 할 수 있었다고.&n이 정도쯤은 아무렇지도 않아.

1502300019.english: Gamma suddenly trailed off and looked at the Iron Bugs lying fallen behind me.
1502300019.korean: - 감마는 갑자기 말끝을 흐리더니 내 뒤에 쓰러져 있는 철충들을 바라보았다.

1502300020.english: Are you really human? Actually, aren't you a male bioroid or something?
1502300020.korean: 너 정말 인간이냐?&n사실 남성 바이오로이드라던가 그런 거 아니야?

1502300022.english: Just then, an Iron Bug that had been hiding in the snow behind me sprang out and charged at me.
1502300022.korean: - 그때 내 뒤쪽에서 눈 속에 숨어있던 철충 한 마리가 튀어나와 나를 향해 달려들었다.

1502300023.english: turned my body and stepped back slightly to dodge the Iron Bug's attack, then drew the 'Commander's Exclusive Pistol Mk. 217' from my holster and fired several shots at the Iron Bug's core.
1502300023.korean: - 나는 몸을 회전시키며 살짝 뒤로 빠져 철충의 공격을 피한 뒤, 홀스터에서 '사령관 전용 권총 Mk. 217을 뽑아 철충의 코어를 향해 수 발을 발사했다.

1502300025.english: The Iron Bug, having sustained fatal damage to its core, became unstable, and I delivered a spinning kick directly at it.
1502300025.korean: - 코어에 치명적 피해를 입은 철충은 움직임이 불안정해졌고, 나는 그대로 철충을 향해 돌려차기를 날렸다.

1502300026.english: The Iron Bug that was hit by the spinning kick flew several meters with a heavy sound, squirmed for a few seconds, and then came to a complete halt.
1502300026.korean: - 돌려차기를 맞은 철충은 묵직한 소리와 함께 수미터를 날아가 몇 초간 꿈틀거리더니 이윽고 완전히 움직임을 멈췄다.

1502300027.english: While receiving physical training from Mighty, I also received combat training from Khan in my spare time to prepare for any eventuality... but I never imagined the day would come when I would actually use it in combat.
1502300027.korean: - 마이티에게 육체 단련을 받으면서, 혹시나 모를 일을 대비에 칸에게 틈틈이 전투 훈련을 받았는데… 설마 실전으로 사용할 날이 올 줄이야.

1502300028.english: Whew~ Haha! That's really amazing! A human taking down an Iron Bug (Iron Bug) all by themselves? You've never seen one before?
1502300028.korean: 휘유~ 하핫! 이거 참 대단한데!&n철충을 단신으로 쓰러트리는 인간이라니 처음 본다고?

1502300030.english: I approached the fallen Iron Bug and fired another bullet at the still-squirming larva, silencing it completely.
1502300030.korean: - 나는 쓰러진 철충에게 다가가 아직 꿈틀대는 유충을 향해 탄환을 다시 발사해 완전히 침묵시켰다.

1502300031.english: So what? What are you planning to do from now on? It doesn't matter to me, but you aren't planning to just keep wandering around hunting Iron Bugs like this, are you?
1502300031.korean: 그래서? 이제부터 어쩔 셈이지?&n나야 상관없지만, 이대로 계속 철충이나 잡으면서 계속 돌아다닐 생각은 아닐 거 아니야?

1502300032.english: Realistically, it is nearly impossible to find and eliminate every single Iron Bug (Iron Bug) interfering with communications on this vast northern front right now.
1502300032.korean: - 현실적으로 지금 이 넓은 북부 전선에서 통신을 방해하는 철충을 일일이 찾아 없애는 건 불가능에 가깝다.

1502300033.english: The fleet on standby at sea was instructed in advance to move away from land and wait in the event of an emergency.
1502300033.korean: - 바다에서 대기 중인 함대에는 만일의 사태가 벌어지면 육지로부터 멀어져서 대기하라고 미리 지시해 놓았다.

1502300034.english: - Perhaps someone who noticed the anomaly requested support from Orca.
1502300034.korean: - 어쩌면 이변을 눈치챈 인원이 오르카에 지원 요청을 했을지도 모른다.

1502300035.english: - The worst-case scenario would be if every member of the standby fleet were also halted by the Nexus's attack.
1502300035.korean: - 최악의 상황이라면…&n대기 중인 함대의 모든 인원도 똑같이 연결체의 공격에 정지당했을 경우다.

1502300036.english: Even if you are still safe, if reinforcements arrive without knowing the information about the connection, you will only end up being defeated.
1502300036.korean: - 만일 아직 무사하더라도 연결체의 정보를 모르는 상황에서 지원이 온다면 도리어 당할 뿐이다.

1502300037.english: Just then, the sound of something approaching from the opposite side of the rock in front was heard.
1502300037.korean: - 그때 앞에 있는 바위 반대편에서 무언가가 이쪽으로 다가오는 소리가 들렸다.

1502300038.english: immediately held my breath and surveyed my surroundings. Gamma, perhaps sensing my approach, also quietly watched the front.
1502300038.korean: - 나는 즉시 숨을 죽이고 주변을 경계했다.&n감마 역시 다가오는 기척을 눈치챘는지 조용히 전방을 주시했다.

1502300039.english: Is it an Iron Bug? No, if it were an Iron Bug, it would have attacked long ago.
1502300039.korean: - 철충인가? 아니, 철충이라면 진작에 달려들었을 거야.

1502300043.english: Ah! My Lord, you are safe!

1502300044.english: It was none other than a dragon that appeared from the other side of the rock. As soon as the dragon saw me, it ran over without the slightest hesitation and hugged me tightly with both arms open.
1502300044.korean: - 바위 반대편에서 모습을 드러낸 건 다름 아닌 용이었다.&n용은 나를 보자마자 조금의 망설임도 없이 달려와 두 팔 벌려 나를 꼭 껴안았다.

1502300046.english: Worried whether my lord escaped safely, I...!
1502300046.korean: 주군께서 무사히 탈출하셨을지 걱정이 되어 소관은…!

1502300047.english: The dragon did not show it outwardly, but bowed its head and sobbed softly, barely audible.
1502300047.korean: - 용은 겉으로 드러내지 않았지만, 고개를 숙이고 들리지 않을 정도로 작게 흐느꼈다.

1502300048.english: To reassure that dragon, I hugged it affectionately and tightly, as if to comfort it.
1502300048.korean: - 나는 그런 용을 안심시키기 위해 다정하게 그리고 안심시키듯 힘주어 안았다.

1502300050.english: As if finally relieved, Yong hugged me tightly once again.
1502300050.korean: - 용은 이제야 안심이 되었는지 다시 한번 나를 강하게 끌어안았다.

1502300051.english: Although Yong always puts on a confident act in front of others, it was conveyed that he is worried about me enough to show this side of himself.
1502300051.korean: - 언제나 남들이 보는 앞에서는 당당한 모습을 보여준 용이지만, 이런 모습을 보여줄 정도로 나를 걱정하고 있다는 게 전해졌다.

1502300052.english: … However, my Lord, the fact that you are still here implies that there was a problem with the escape, doesn't it? From the looks of it, the captain and guards are nowhere to be seen…
1502300052.korean: …허나 주군, 아직 여기에 계시다는 건 탈출에 무슨 문제가 있었다는 게 아니오?&n보아하니 경호 대장과 경호 대원들이 보이지 않는데…

1502300053.english: I see... I, too, faced a Linker Iron Bug launching unknown attacks while dealing with the swarming Iron Bugs.
1502300053.korean: 그렇구려…&n소관 역시 몰려오는 철충들을 상대하면서 알 수 없는 공격을 하는 연결체 철충과 마주하였소.

1502300054.english: Right, I was actually talking to the commander over there about that connector. Did you see it in person, too?
1502300054.korean: 맞아, 안 그래도 그쪽 사령관이랑 그 연결체에 관해 이야기를 했지.&n너도 직접 녀석을 봤나 용?

1502300059.english: Why are you here? It was you Orcas who came to help me, wasn't it?
1502300059.korean: 왜 여기에 있긴?&n나를 도와주려고 찾아온 건 너희 오르카잖아?

1502300060.english: In contrast, your commander actually received my help. Anyway...
1502300060.korean: 그에 비해 너희 사령관은 오히려 내 도움을 받았지만 말이야.&n그나저나…

1502300061.english: How long are you two going to keep hugging each other like that?
1502300061.korean: 너희 둘, 언제까지 서로 그렇게 껴안고 있을 거지?

1502300063.english: When Gamma pointed it out, the dragon was startled and moved away from me.
1502300063.korean: - 감마가 지적하자 용은 화들짝 놀라며 나에게서 떨어졌다.

1502300064.english: Ah, never mind. You don't need to make excuses. I heard everything from your commander.
1502300064.korean: 아~ 됐어 됐어. 변명 하지 않아도 괜찮아.&n너희 사령관에게 다 들었으니까.

1502300065.english: I mean that the two of them were in a special kind of relationship. Haha, to think that dragon was having an affair with a man.
1502300065.korean: 두 사람이 특별한 애정 행각을 벌인 사이라는 걸 말이야.&n크크, 그 용이 남자와 애정 행각이라니.

1502300067.english: A misunderstanding? That's too much, Commander.

1502300068.english: Then, was the night we spent passionately pressed together a lie?
1502300068.korean: 나와 꼬옥 붙어서 뜨겁게 보낸 하룻밤은 그럼 거짓이었나?

1502300071.english: I had to give another all-out explanation while receiving a look filled with the dragon's shock.
1502300071.korean: - 나는 용의 충격으로 가득 찬 눈초리를 받으며 다시 한번 전력을 다한 해명을 해야 했다.

1502300072.english: Just in case, I'm asking about Gamma.

1502300074.english: You're the one who... me too much

1502300076.english: It's a pistol Azaz specially made for me.
1502300076.korean: 아자즈가 내 전용으로 특별 제작한 권총이야.

1502300077.english: It does boast more power than a standard pistol, but...
1502300077.korean: 일반적인 권총보다 강력한 위력을 자랑하긴 하는데…

1502300078.english: It's a pistol packed with various functions, so it's complicated; I'll stop here.
1502300078.korean: 이런저런 다양한 기능이 들어간 권총이라 복잡하니 여기까지만 말할게.

1502300079.english: Finding a way to contact Orca is the top priority.
1502300079.korean: 오르카와 연락을 취할 방법을 찾는 게 급선무야.

1502300080.english: To do that, we must find and eliminate the Iron Bug that are interfering with the communication…
1502300080.korean: 그러기 위해서는 통신을 방해하고 있는 철충을 찾아 없애야 하는데…

1502300081.english: Gamma, first, let's check if the fleet is safe...

1502300083.english: The reason I was safe is because the dragon and everyone protected me.
1502300083.korean: 내가 무사할 수 있었던 건, 용과 모두가 나를 지켜줬기 때문이야.

1502300084.english: And thank you. For being safe.

1502300085.english: I had no choice but to get separated from everyone because the Iron Bugs kept chasing me…
1502300085.korean: 계속 쫓아오는 철충 때문에 모두와 떨어질 수밖에 없었어…

1502300086.english: It's a misunderstanding! I didn't say anything!
1502300086.korean: 오해야! 나는 아무 말도 하지 않았어!

1502300087.english: It's a misunderstanding! Well, it's not wrong, but...

1502400001.english: - Yong joined us, and we started to sort out the situation again.
1502400001.korean: - 용이 합류하고 우리는 다시 상황을 정리하기 시작했다.

1502400002.english: After confirming that his lord had left the base, Sogwan, along with the remaining Steel Line members, held off the swarming Iron Bugs.
1502400002.korean: 주군이 기지에서 벗어난 걸 확인한 소관은, 남은 스틸 라인 대원들과 함께 몰려오는 철충들을 막았소.

1502400003.english: We kept trying to request support from Orca, but ultimately couldn't contact them due to the Iron Bug's interference...
1502400003.korean: 오르카에 지원 요청을 계속 시도했지만, 철충들의 통신 방해로 끝내 연락할 수 없었고...

1502400004.english: Our Orca members bravely faced the continuously swarming Iron Bugs without backing down a single step.
1502400004.korean: 계속해서 몰려오는 철충들을 우리 오르카 대원들은 한 발짝도 물러서지 않고 당당하게 맞섰다오.

1502400005.english: The dragon stopped there and frowned slightly, as if recalling something unpleasant.
1502400005.korean: - 용은 거기까지 말하고 좋지 않은 일을 떠올렸는지 살짝 얼굴을 찡그렸다.

1502400006.english: Then, after observing my complexion, he seemed to hesitate to say anything more. He must be worried that I might be shocked.
1502400006.korean: - 그리고 내 안색을 살피더니 이 이상 말하는 걸 망설이는 듯했다.&n분명 내가 충격을 받을까 걱정하는 거겠지.

1502400007.english: I nodded to that dragon to indicate that it was okay.
1502400007.korean: - 나는 그런 용에게 괜찮다는 뜻으로 고개를 끄덕였다.

1502400009.english: As reported, the Iron Bug (Iron Bug) in the connector had some effect on the soldiers, and those affected began to stop moving one by one.
1502400009.korean: 보고대로 연결체 철충은 대원들에게 무언가 영향을 주었고, 그 영향을 받은 대원들은 하나둘씩 움직임을 멈추기 시작했소.

1502400010.english: However, for some reason, they only stopped the troops' movements and did not attack any further.
1502400010.korean: 허나 놈들은 무슨 이유에서 인지 대원들의 움직임을 멈추게 할 뿐 그 이상 공격하지는 않았소.

1502400011.english: And I ended up here while traveling to somehow deliver the information I had gathered so far to my lord, at Captain Marie's suggestion.
1502400011.korean: 그리고 마리 대장의 제안으로 지금까지 얻은 정보를, 어떻게든 주군에게 전달하기 위해 이동하던 중 여기까지 오게 된 거요.

1502400012.english: am truly sorry, my lord... I have no face to show you. I should have protected everyone...
1502400012.korean: 정말 죄송하오 주군… 주군을 볼 낯이 없소.&n소관이 모두를 지켰어야 했는데…

1502400014.english: After saying that much, the dragon could not open its mouth again. And the meaning of that silence was conveyed to me without being spoken.
1502400014.korean: - 거기까지 말한 후 용은 더 이상 입을 열지 못했다.&n그리고 그 침묵이 의미하는 바는 말하지 않아도 나에게 전달됐다.

1502400015.english: Yong seemed to feel guilty for failing to protect his team members.
1502400015.korean: - 용은 아무래도 대원들을 지키지 못한 죄책감을 느끼는 듯했다.

1502400017.english: I wonder if the outcome would have been different if I had done a little better, if I had made the right choice…
1502400017.korean: - 내가 조금 더 잘했더라면, 올바른 선택을 했었더라면…&n다른 결과가 나오지 않았을까 하고…

1502400018.english: We are still alive. And we haven't given up. If that is the case, it is not over.
1502400018.korean: - 아직 우리는 살아있다. 그리고 포기하지 않았다. 그렇다면 끝난 게 아니다.

1502400019.english: "—It is a title that was maintained because of luck... and because of excellent subordinates... That is truly the case. I, too, have been lucky until now... and because everyone was there, I was able to come this far without a single defeat."
1502400019.korean: - 운이 좋아서… 훌륭한 부하들이 있어서... 유지되고 있었던 칭호… 정말 그 말대로다.&n나 역시 지금까지 운이 좋아서... 모두가 있었기 때문에, 한 번의 패배도 없이 여기까지 올 수 있었다.

1502400022.english: Of course! I have pledged to become my Lord's sword. I will devote all my strength to my Lord until the very end.
1502400022.korean: 물론이오! 소관은 주군의 검이 되기로 한 몸.&n마지막까지 주군을 위해 모든 힘을 다하겠소.

1502400023.english: I ought to be supporting my lord... To be receiving encouragement instead... I am ashamed... It seems I was momentarily soft-hearted.
1502400023.korean: 본래라면 소관이 주군을 지탱해 줘야 하는 것을… 오히려 격려를 받다니… 부끄럽구려…&n잠시 마음이 약해진 모양이오.

1502400024.english: My, my lord... I... I understand...

1502400025.english: Is it over now? That incredibly boring display of affection?
1502400025.korean: 이제 끝났나? 지루하기 짝이 없는 애정 행각은?

1502400026.english: Gamma!? You were right next to me!?

1502400027.english: You were completely lost in your own world. Well, I was by your side from the very beginning.
1502400027.korean: 아주 두 사람의 세계에 빠져있었군.&n그야 처음부터 계속 옆에 있었지.

1502400029.english: The weakened form of the dragon from a moment ago has vanished without a trace, and it has returned to its usual appearance. It seems just a tiny bit different, though…
1502400029.korean: - 조금 전의 약해진 용의 모습은 온데간데없고 평소의 용의 모습으로 돌아왔다.&n아주 조금은 다른 것 같지만…

1502400030.english: In any case, the addition of the dragon has significantly increased the available options. Given our current strength, rescuing the team members is not an unreasonable choice.
1502400030.korean: - 어쨌든 용의 합류로 선택할 수 있는 선택지가 많이 늘어났다.&n지금의 전력이라면 대원들을 구조한다는 선택도 무리는 아니다.

1502400031.english: - Anyway, it's a huge relief that the dragon is safe.

1502400034.english: Come to think of it, why is the dragon safe?
1502400034.korean: - 그러고 보니 용은 왜 무사한 거지?

1502400035.english: find that part puzzling as well. All the other members were affected by the connector and stopped moving, but I was completely unaffected.
1502400035.korean: 그 부분은 소관도 의아하게 생각하오.&n다른 대원들은 모두 연결체의 영향을 받고 움직임이 멈추었지만, 소관은 아무렇지도 않았으니 말이오.

1502400036.english: However… I am sorry, my lord. I also have absolutely no idea why I feel as though I am perfectly fine.
1502400036.korean: 하지만… 죄송하오 주군.&n소관도 왜 자신은 아무렇지도 않는지 도통 이유를 모르겠소.

1502400037.english: The Nexus Iron Bug did make some unidentifiable sounds and signal. In fact, after that action, the team members stopped all movement at once.
1502400037.korean: 연결체 철충이 무언가 알 수 없는 소리를 내며 신호를 내는 행동을 하기는 했소.&n실제로 그 행동 이후 대원들이 움직임을 일제히 멈추었소.

1502400038.english: A signal? Ah, come to think of it, they did do that to me, too. I just ignored it because it didn't have any particular effect.
1502400038.korean: 신호? 아, 그러고 보니 나한테도 그런 행동을 하기는 했지.&n별 다른 영향이 없어서 무시했지만.

1502400039.english: Strange sounds and signals… In that case, it’s definitely some kind of brainwashing or hypnosis…
1502400039.korean: - 이상한 소리와 신호…&n그렇다면 역시 일종의 세뇌나 최면 같은 종류인 건 확실해…

1502400040.english: However, just like with Gamma, for some reason it has no effect on dragons. It would be more accurate to say that they are 'unaffected.'
1502400040.korean: - 그런데 감마와 마찬가지로 어째서인지 용에게는 그 효과가 없어.&n'영향을 받지 않는다'라고 보는 게 더 정확하겠지.

1502400041.english: Since it didn't affect Gamma, I initially thought it was because he had a Lemonade individual or a Kestos Himas, but the Dragon doesn't fit into either category.
1502400041.korean: - 감마에게 영향이 없어서 처음에는 레모네이드 개체 혹은 케스토스 히마스를 가지고 있어서라고 생각했지만, 용은 어디에도 해당하지 않아.

1502400042.english: What on earth is the reason? What do the two of them have in common?
1502400042.korean: - 대체 이유가 뭐지?&n두 사람에게 어떤 공통점이 있는 거지?

1502400045.english: My Lord? What is the matter?

1502400048.english: My Lord… to think you were trying to verify… what on earth…

1502400049.english: Haha, I see, I understand now. It's a valid guess.
1502400049.korean: 하핫, 과연 그런 건가 이해했어.&n일리 있는 추측이야.

1502400050.english: Commander of Orca, so you think we weren't affected because we have the 'right of insubordination' to refuse human orders... is that it?
1502400050.korean: 오르카의 사령관, 너는 우리가 인간의 명령을 거부할 수 있는 '항명권'이 있기 때문에&n영향을 받지 않은 게 아닐까… 라고 생각하는 거군?

1502400051.english: My Lord, does that mean the Nexus Iron Bug used human command against us?
1502400051.korean: 주군, 그 말은 연결체 철충이 우리를 향해 인간의 명령권을 사용했다는 뜻이오?

1502400052.english: It’s not entirely nonsensical, is it? There’s already a brainwashing device similar to the one Omega made.
1502400052.korean: 전혀 말이 안 되는 건 아니지, 이미 비슷한 걸로 오메가 녀석이 만든 세뇌 장치가 있잖아.

1502400053.english: The difference is that they were affected even without a brainwashing device being directly applied.
1502400053.korean: 다른 점이라면 직접적으로 세뇌 장치를 씌우지 않아도 영향을 받았다는 거지.

1502400054.english: The only saving grace is that, perhaps because it wasn't direct brainwashing, it stopped at merely stopping the behavior.
1502400054.korean: 그나마 다행이라면 직접적인 세뇌가 아니어서 그런지 모르겠지만, 행동을 멈추게 하는 선에서 그쳤다는 거야.

1502400055.english: Otherwise, they would have attacked their own allies as soon as they were brainwashed and ordered to attack.
1502400055.korean: 그게 아니라면 세뇌당하자마자 공격하라는 명령에 아군끼리 서로 공격했을 테니까.

1502400056.english: Even if he is a battle maniac, lemonade is still lemonade; Gamma read my thoughts accurately.
1502400056.korean: - 전투광이라고 해도 레모네이드는 역시 레모네이드인지, 감마는 나의 생각을 정확히 읽었다.

1502400057.english: In a way, the current situation is similar to what happened in the fairy village.
1502400057.korean: - 지금의 상황은 어떻게 보면 요정 마을에서 있었던 일과 비슷하다.

1502400058.english: At that time, the residents of the fairy village were brainwashed by Omega's scheme using brainwashing earrings, but with Alfred's help, they were able to break the brainwashing by hacking Robert's main body, which was issuing the brainwashing commands.
1502400058.korean: - 그때는 세뇌 귀걸이를 이용한 오메가의 계략으로 요정 마을 주민들이 세뇌되었고,&n알프레드의 도움으로 세뇌 명령을 내리는 로버트 본체를 해킹하여 세뇌를 풀 수 있었다.

1502400059.english: However, there are no devices like Omega's earrings or Delta's helmet right now. That means they probably aren't still under brainwashing orders.
1502400059.korean: - 하지만 지금은 오메가의 귀걸이나 델타 때의 헬멧 같은 장치는 없어.&n그렇다는 건 계속해서 세뇌 명령을 받는 상태는 아닐 거야.

1502400060.english: If we assume that by sending a special signal to a target directly facing it, we can issue nothing more than a simple, one-time command to 'do nothing'...
1502400060.korean: - 직접 마주한 대상에게 특별한 신호를 흘러 넣어, '아무런 행동도 하지 않는다'라는&n일회성의 단순한 명령밖에 내릴 수 없다고 가정을 한다면…

1502400062.english: Is that really true, my lord!?

1502400063.english: Everyone, please wait just a little longer. I will definitely save them.
1502400063.korean: - 모두 조금만 기다려줘.&n내가 반드시 구할 테니까.

1502400065.english: Are the Merope kids okay after leaving the base before fighting the Iron Bug? I hope nothing bad happened to them…
1502400065.korean: - 철충과 싸우기 전에 기지를 나선 메로페 애들은 괜찮은 건가?&n아무 일도 없으면 좋겠는데…

1502400066.english: The Nexus… so the Iron Bug appeared, right?

1502400069.english: You told me. Everyone in Orca is prepared.
1502400069.korean: 네가 나에게 알려줬잖아. 오르카의 모두는 각오 하고 있다고.

1502400070.english: I resent myself and am angry right now.
1502400070.korean: 나는 지금 내 자신이 원망스럽고 분해.

1502400071.korean: 하지만, 겨우 한 번 패배했을 뿐이야.

1502400072.english: I told you that "Invincible" is a precarious title, didn't I? That it is a title that will be denied if you are defeated even once.
1502400072.korean: 무적이 위태로운 칭호라고 말했지? 한 번 패배해버리면 부정될 칭호라고.

1502400073.english: Our Orca was definitely defeated this time. It might not be invincible anymore.
1502400073.korean: 확실히 이번에 우리 오르카는 패배했어. 더 이상 무적이 아닐지도 모르지.

1502400074.english: So from now on, not invincible without defeat…
1502400074.korean: 그러니까 지금부터는 패배가 없는 무적이 아닌…

1502400075.english: Be invincible, meaning you don't give up even when you fall and get back up again and again.
1502400075.korean: 쓰러져도 포기하지 않고 몇 번이고 다시 일어서는 의미의 무적이 되어줘.

1502400076.english: Swing your sword for me again.

1502400077.english: Please give me encouragement in my room after everything is finished.
1502400077.korean: 나를 위한 격려는 모든 일이 끝나고 내 방에서 해줘.

1502400078.english: Dragon, was there anything particularly strange when you encountered the Nexus Iron Bug?
1502400078.korean: 용, 연결체 철충을 만났을 때 따로 이상한 점은 없었어?

1502400079.english: There was a hint that it had been subjected to some kind of special attack.
1502400079.korean: 뭔가 특수한 공격을 받은 낌새가 있었다던가.

1502400082.english: Ahem! It's an order. You two, want to give each other a hug?
1502400082.korean: 크흠! 명령이야. 두 사람, 서로 껴안아 볼래?

1502400083.english: I'm sorry! This was the only command I could think of right now that the two of you would absolutely never give!
1502400083.korean: 미안해! 두 사람이 절대 안 할 것 같은 명령이 당장 이것밖에 떠오르지 않았어!

1502400084.english: I was just trying to check! So please don't look at me like that!
1502400084.korean: 그냥 확인만 하려고 한 거야! 그러니까 그런 눈으로 날 쳐다보지 말아줘!

1502400085.english: Right, it's just a guess, though.

1502400086.english: Maybe… we might be able to save everyone.
1502400086.korean: 어쩌면… 모두를 구할 수 있을지도 몰라.

1502400087.english: On the contrary, it is possible to turn this situation around in one fell swoop.
1502400087.korean: 오히려 이 상황을 단 번에 역전도 가능해.

1502400088.english: Yeah, at least it's worth a try.
1502400088.korean: 응, 적어도 시험해 볼 가치는 있어.

1502500001.english: Having devised several operations, we were surveying the situation near the Poseidon base before execution.
1502500001.korean: - 몇 가지의 작전을 세운 우리는 실행에 앞서 포세이돈 기지 근처에서 상황을 살피고 있었다.

1502500002.english: I was wondering what they were going to do... Are they just hiding like a rat, peeking around nervously?
1502500002.korean: 뭘 어떻게 하나 싶었는데…&n쥐새끼 마냥 숨어서 힐끗힐끗 눈치나 보는 건가?

1502500003.english: Brainwashing won't work on us anyway, so let's go in head-on. With your command and the combined strength of me and the Dragon, we should be more than enough to take on the Nexus.
1502500003.korean: 어차피 우리에게는 세뇌가 통하지 않으니 정면으로 들어가자고.&n네 녀석의 지휘 그리고 나와 용의 전력이라면 연결체를 상대하고도 충분하잖아.

1502500004.english: Hmph, fine, fine. I was the one who suggested cooperating first, so I'll stick with it until the end.
1502500004.korean: 흥, 알았다 알았어.&n협력하자고 먼저 말을 꺼낸 건 내쪽이니 마지막까지 어울려주마.

1502500006.english: I searched the area around the base, but only a few Iron Bugs were roaming around. I don't see any Nexus Iron Bugs.
1502500006.korean: 기지 주변을 살펴보았지만, 소수의 철충이 돌아다닐 뿐.&n연결체 철충은 보이지 않소.

1502500007.english: It looks like they probably moved to another place with the group.
1502500007.korean: 아마 무리를 데리고 다른 곳으로 이동한 모양이오.

1502500008.english: Is he not here... It is a fortunate situation, if you can call it that.

1502500009.english: However... the strangest thing of all is...

1502500010.english: It is not just the Steel Line and Sisters of Valhalla members who are missing. I went to the area near where I had gotten separated from the Companions, but I couldn't find the two of them either.
1502500010.korean: - 보이지 않는 건 스틸 라인과 시스터즈 오브 발할라 대원뿐만이 아니다.&n컴패니언 애들과 떨어졌던 지점 부근에 가보았지만, 두 사람의 모습도 찾을 수 없었다.

1502500011.english: I felt anxious that I couldn't see anyone, but at the same time, I felt a sense of relief. The fact that they aren't visible means the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) took them somewhere, so there is a high probability that they are still safe.
1502500011.korean: - 모두의 모습이 보이지 않는 게 불안하지만, 한편으로는 안도감도 느꼈다.&n모습이 보이지 않는 다는 건 철충들이 어디론가 데려갔다는 거고, 그렇다면 아직 무사할 확률이 높다.

1502500012.english: The problem is, where on earth did they take all those people...
1502500012.korean: - 문제는 그 많은 인원을 대체 어디로 데려갔냐는 건데…

1502500013.english: If by any chance you have already left the Alaska region… that’s the worst…
1502500013.korean: - 혹시라도 이미 알래스카 지역을 벗어났다고 하면… 최악이야…

1502500015.english: Looking in the direction indicated by the dragon's low cry, several Iron Bugs were heading toward Poseidon's base.
1502500015.korean: - 용의 나지막한 외침에 가리킨 방향을 보니 몇 마리의 철충이 포세이돈 기지 쪽으로 향하고 있었고.

1502500016.english: - In the group... the figure of a fallen leprechaun was visible.
1502500016.korean: - 그 무리 속에는... 쓰러진 레프리콘의 모습이 보였다.

1502500018.english: Haha, alright! Let's give it a try!
1502500018.korean: 하핫, 좋아! 어디 한 번 해보자고 용!

1502500019.english: Alright, it's time to counterattack. I'm going to show you clearly that Orca won't crumble at this rate.
1502500019.korean: - 자, 지금부터 반격이다.&n오르카가 이 정도로는 무너지지 않는다는 걸 똑똑히 보여주겠어.

1502500020.english: You heard the plan... It's not the right time yet. Please bear with me for now.
1502500020.korean: 작전은 들었잖아… 아직은 때가 아니야. 지금은 참아줘.

1502500021.english: The goal of this operation is not to take down the connector, but to rescue everyone.
1502500021.korean: 이번 작전의 목표는 연결체를 쓰러트리는 게 아니라 모두를 구출하는 거야.

1502500022.english: Welcome, Dragon. How is the surrounding situation?

1502500023.english: … I know, I’ve been worried about it for a while too.

1502500024.english: I can't see our Orca members anywhere.
1502500024.korean: 어딜 봐도 우리 오르카 대원의 모습이 보이지 않아.

1502500026.english: … I'll ask you to keep it as quiet as possible.

1502600001.english: My Lord, I have dealt with all the Iron Bug in the vicinity. There is no sign of any other Iron Bug approaching yet.
1502600001.korean: 주군, 주변의 철충은 모두 처리했소.&n아직은 몰려오는 다른 철충의 낌새는 없소.

1502600002.english: With the swift attacks of the Dragon and Gamma, they defeated all the passing Iron Bugs and successfully rescued the Leprechaun they were with.
1502600002.korean: - 용과 감마의 속전 속결한 공격으로 지나가는 철충을 전부 쓰러트리고, 데리고 있던 레프리콘을 무사히 구출하는 데 성공했다.

1502600003.english: I wondered if the Leprechaun was still brainwashed. Even when looking at my face, it still didn't move and remained silent.
1502600003.korean: - 레프리콘은 여전히 세뇌당한 상태인 건지.&n내 얼굴을 봐도 여전히 움직이지 않고 침묵만을 유지했다.

1502600005.english: The brainwashing that took place in the fairy village could be lifted thanks to the help of Snow Feather, Acrobatic Sunny, and Alfred.
1502600005.korean: - 요정 마을에서 있었던 세뇌는 스노우 페더와 아크로바틱 써니, 그리고 알프레드의 도움이 있었기에 풀 수 있었다.

1502600006.english: - And one more person… with the help of the Black Worm as well…
1502600006.korean: - 그리고 또 한 사람… 블랙 웜의 도움도…

1502600007.english: The Black Worm at that time was less affected by the brainwashing command, which bypassed it due to the influence of the emotion control module, and was waiting in front of the central control room to help us.
1502600007.korean: - 그때의 블랙 웜은 감정 제어 모듈의 영향으로 세뇌 명령을 우회하여 영향을 덜 받았고,&n우리에게 도움을 주기 위해 중앙제어실 앞에서 기다리고 있었다.

1502600008.english: With just a single command from me, the Black Worm temporarily resisted the brainwashing of ceaseless orders and opened the way for us.
1502600008.korean: - 단 한 번의 내 명령으로 블랙웜은 끊임없이 명령을 내리는 세뇌에 일시적으로 저항했고, 우리에게 길을 열어주었다.

1502600010.english: - If… this brainwashing is similar to back then… if it is not a continuous issuance of commands through a brainwashing device, but simply a one-time command…
1502600010.korean: - 만약… 이 세뇌가 그때와 비슷하다면…&n세뇌 장치를 통해 끊임없이 명령을 내리는 게 아닌, 단순한 일회성 명령이라면…

1502600013.english: What? Of course, there is no way I wouldn't recognize Your Excellency…
1502600013.korean: 네? 그야 제가 각하를 못 알아볼 리가…

1502600014.english: was overwhelmed with emotion at the sight of the Leprechaun returning to his original self, and I hugged him just like that.
1502600014.korean: - 레프리콘이 원래대로 돌아온 모습에 나는 감정이 복받쳐 올랐고, 그대로 레프리콘을 끌어안았다.

1502600015.english: Wait... Your Excellency!? What is wrong? It’s not that I’m in a difficult situation...
1502600015.korean: 잠... 각하!? 왜 그러세요? 이러시면 곤란… 한 건 아닌데요…

1502600016.english: Hmm... I'm not entirely sure, but if Your Excellency wishes, I will lend you my heart as much as you want until you calm down.
1502600016.korean: 으음… 잘은 모르겠지만, 각하께서 원하신다면 진정되실 때까지 얼마든지 제 가슴을 빌려드릴게요.

1502600017.english: In this way, we were able to make small but significant progress.
1502600017.korean: - 이렇게 우리는 작지만 큰 전진을 해낼 수 있었다.

1502600018.english: I see... It's not just me, but everyone who has experienced something like that...
1502600018.korean: 그렇군요… 저뿐만이 아니라 모두에게 그런 일이…

1502600019.english: After I had calmed down a bit, I told the leprechaun about the current situation.
1502600019.korean: - 어느 정도 진정된 후 나는 레프리콘에게 지금의 상황을 말해줬다.

1502600020.english: Yes… my last memory is when I fought the Iron Bug alongside Brownie. Brownie was defeated first, and it seems I was defeated by a Nexus Iron Bug right after that.
1502600020.korean: 네… 제 마지막 기억은 브라우니와 함께 철충과 싸웠을 때입니다.&n먼저 브라우니가 당했고 그 직후 저도 연결체 철충에게 당한 것 같습니다.

1502600021.english: What happened? In the fairy village, everyone remembered everything that happened while they were brainwashed. But the Leprechaun doesn't remember anything at all.
1502600021.korean: - 어떻게 된 거지? 요정 마을 때는 모두 세뇌당한 동안 있었던 일들을 전부 기억하고 있었어.&n그런데 레프리콘은 전혀 기억 못하고 있어.

1502600022.english: In that case, is it somehow different from the brainwashing in the fairy village?
1502600022.korean: - 그렇다면 요정 마을에서의 세뇌와는 뭔가가 다른 건가?

1502600023.english: No... there is no real point in worrying about this now. Right now, breaking everyone's brainwashing is the priority.
1502600023.korean: - 아니... 지금 와서 이걸 고민해봤자 큰 의미는 없어.&n지금은 모두의 세뇌를 푸는 게 먼저야.

1502600024.english: Fortunately, it has been verified through the Leprechaun that I can break the brainwashing under my command. All that remains is the place where everyone is...
1502600024.korean: - 다행히 레프리콘을 통해 내 명령으로 세뇌를 풀 수 있다는 게 검증이 됐어.&n남은 건 모두가 있는 장소인데…

1502600025.english: I can't be entirely sure, but it was definitely heading toward Poseidon Base. In that case, could it be?
1502600025.korean: 정확히는 알 수 없지만, 분명 포세이돈 기지 쪽으로 향하고는 있었소.&n그렇다면 혹시?

1502600026.english: Understood. In that case, I will go inside first to check if the troops are there…
1502600026.korean: 알겠소.&n그렇다면 소관이 먼저 안으로 들어가 대원들이 있는지 확인을…

1502600028.english: I put away the data panel I was holding and took out the pistol from the holster.
1502600028.korean: - 나는 들고 있던 데이터 패널을 집어넣고 홀스터에서 권총을 꺼내 들었다.

1502600029.english: Furthermore, if there are soldiers inside the base, I must be there to immediately break the brainwashing and set everyone free.
1502600029.korean: - 게다가 만일 기지 안에 대원들이 있다면 내가 있어야지만, 즉시 세뇌를 풀고 모두를 자유롭게 해줄 수가 있다.

1502600030.english: As if the meaning had been conveyed, the dragon smiled gently.
1502600030.korean: - 그 뜻이 전해졌는지 용은 부드러운 미소를 지었다.

1502600031.english: Hahaha, I fully understand my lord's will. In that case, show them.
1502600031.korean: 후후, 주군의 뜻을 잘 알겠소.&n그렇다면 놈들에게 보여주시오.

1502600032.english: That my lord wasn't hiding behind everyone just because he was afraid of losing his life. That he is a man braver and more determined than anyone else in Orca.
1502600032.korean: 주군이 그저 제 몸이 아까워 모두의 뒤에 숨어 있었던 게 아니라는 걸.&n오르카의 그 누구보다 용감하고 각오가 된 사내란 사실을 말이오.

1502600033.english: I will go with you, Your Excellency. The humiliation of being brainwashed until now. As a member of the Steel Line, I cannot let this slide!
1502600033.korean: 저도 같이 가겠습니다, 각하.&n지금까지 세뇌당한 굴욕. 스틸 라인 부대원으로서 넘어갈 수는 없어요!

1502600034.english: I'm sorry to spoil the mood while you're getting along, but if you're going to take action, you'd better hurry.
1502600034.korean: 의기투합 중에 분위기를 깨서 미안하지만, 행동할 거라면 서두르는 게 좋을 거야.

1502600035.english: The Iron Bugs must have noticed, because they are swarming towards here.
1502600035.korean: 철충 녀석들이 눈치를 챘는지 이곳으로 몰려오고 있어.

1502600036.english: Haha, fine! Well then, see you later, Commander of Orca.
1502600036.korean: 하하 좋아!&n그럼, 나중에 보자고 오르카의 사령관.

1502600037.english: As previously agreed, Yong, Leprechaun, and I set off to rescue the crew, while Gamma took on the role of buying time.
1502600037.korean: - 사전에 얘기한 대로 나와 용 그리고 레프리콘은 대원들의 구출을, 감마는 시간을 끄는 역할을 위해 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1502600038.english: On the way, I stopped for a moment and looked back at Gamma.
1502600038.korean: - 도중 나는 잠깐 발걸음을 멈추고 감마를 뒤돌아봤다.

1502600039.english: Huh? What is it? There shouldn't be time for small talk.

1502600040.english: With those words, I hurriedly headed to the Poseidon base.
1502600040.korean: - 그 말을 끝으로 나는 서둘러 포세이돈 기지로 향했다.

1502600043.english: Hahaha, Omega too, I don't know why everyone takes me for granted like this.
1502600043.korean: 크크크, 오메가도 그렇고 왜 이렇게 다들 날 너무 쉽게 보는 건지 모르겠군.

1502600044.english: If not, have I changed too much compared to my past self, more than I thought?
1502600044.korean: 그게 아니라면 생각했던 것 보다 예전의 나에 비해 너무 많이 달라진 건가?

1502600045.english: … Be careful? Who are you worrying about right now?

1502600046.english: "It's a useless worry," said the commander of Orca.

1502600049.english: Leprechaun, it's an order. You may move freely.

1502600050.english: Leprechaun! Are you okay? Do you recognize me?

1502600052.english: Leprechaun, do you happen to have no memory of when you were brainwashed?
1502600052.korean: 레프리콘, 혹시 세뇌당했을 때의 기억은 없어?

1502600053.english: The Iron Bugs that were with the dragon and the leprechaun were heading toward Poseidon Base, right?
1502600053.korean: 용, 레프리콘을 데리고 있던 철충들은 포세이돈 기지를 향하고 있었지?

1502600054.english: Yeah, maybe everyone is inside the base.
1502600054.korean: 그래, 어쩌면 기지 안에 모두가 있을지도 몰라.

1502600055.english: No, I'm going in with you too.

1502600056.english: Please don't say it's dangerous now.
1502600056.korean: 이제 와서 위험하다는 말은 하지 말아줘.

1502600057.english: The situation has changed a lot.

1502600058.english: I can't just hide behind everyone and give orders like I've done until now.
1502600058.korean: 이제는 지금까지 그랬던 것처럼 모두의 뒤에 숨어 지시만 내릴 수는 없어.

1502600061.english: Okay, then I'll go with Plan A as we discussed beforehand.
1502600061.korean: 알겠어, 그럼 사전에 얘기한 대로 플랜A로 갈게.

1502700001.english: Haha! Great! This is it! It's starting to burn!

1502700002.english: For an Iron Bug, you actually entertain me quite a bit!

1502700003.english: Go ahead and try to take me down! I’ll take you on any number of times!
1502700003.korean: 어서 날 쓰러트려 보라고!&n얼마든지 상대해 줄 테니까!

1502700004.english: (Hmm, it's been quite a while since the Orca commander entered the base, is it still a long way off?)
1502700004.korean: (흠, 오르카의 사령관이 기지에 진입하고 제법 시간이 지났는데 아직 멀었나?)

1502700005.english: (I'm holding off the swarming Iron Bugs, but I can't see the Nexus Iron Bugs.)
1502700005.korean: (계속해서 몰려오는 철충을 막고 있지만, 연결체 철충의 모습이 보이지 않아.)

1502700006.english: (Are they after something else... or have they been inside the base from the start?)
1502700006.korean: (다른 무언가를 노리고 있거나… 아니면 처음부터 기지 내부에 있는 건가?)

1502700007.english: (Well, whatever. I'm just going to smash everything, just like I always have.)
1502700007.korean: (뭐, 아무래도 좋아. 나는 늘 그래왔던 것처럼 모든 걸 부숴버릴 뿐이니까.)

1502700008.english: (...Huh? What's wrong? What's wrong with Kestos Himas?)

1502700009.english: (Tsk, just when it was starting to get interesting, is it starting to get overloaded?)
1502700009.korean: (쯧, 이제 좀 재밌어지려고 하는데 슬슬 과부하가 찾아온 건가.)

1502700010.english: (Perhaps due to the accumulated damage... my movements are becoming sluggish, albeit slowly.)
1502700010.korean: (그동안의 대미지도 누적된 탓인지… 몸의 움직임도 조금씩이지만 둔해지고 있어.)

1502700011.english: No, wait, wouldn't it be more fun with a handicap like this?
1502700011.korean: 아니지, 이 정도 핸디캡은 있어야 더 재밌지 않겠어?

1502700013.english: I wonder which will come first: my limit or your annihilation!
1502700013.korean: 나의 한계와 너희들의 전멸 중에 어느 게 먼저일지 말이야!

1502700014.english: The situation was spiraling into a race against time.

1502700015.english: While Gamma holds off the Iron Bug's movements from the outside, I must find the squad members and break the brainwashing.
1502700015.korean: - 외부에서 감마가 철충의 움직임을 막아주는 사이, 나는 대원들을 찾아 세뇌를 풀어줘야 한다.

1502700016.english: If my prediction is correct, the Nexus Iron Bug is not at this base right now. In that case, now is the perfect opportunity.
1502700016.korean: - 내 예상이 맞는다면 연결체 철충은 지금 이곳 기지에 없다. 그렇다면 지금이 절호의 기회다.

1502700017.english: If the personnel are inside this base, a large space is needed to accommodate them. Within this base, the fleet hangar is the only place that fits that description.
1502700017.korean: - 대원들이 이 기지 안에 있다면 그 인원들을 수용할 수 있는 넓은 공간이 필요하다.&n이 기지 내에서 그런 장소라면 함대 격납고 딱 한 곳밖에 없다.

1502700018.english: Your Excellency! There are Iron Bugs ahead! There are five of them!

1502700021.english: The dragon unhesitatingly charged into the Iron Bugs that appeared in front, drew one of its four swords, and instantly cut down two of them.
1502700021.korean: - 용은 전방에 나타난 철충들 사이로 거리낌 없이 파고 들었고, 네 개의 검 중 한 자루를 꺼내어 순식간에 두 마리의 철충을 베어넘겼다.

1502700022.english: Leave the finishing touches to me!

1502700023.english: Leprechaun calmly aimed at the core of the Iron Bug that had been immobilized by the dragon's sword strike.
1502700023.korean: - 용의 검격에 제대로 움직이지 못하게 된 철충을 레프리콘은 침착하게 코어를 겨냥에 사격했다.

1502700024.english: With a clean combination where the Dragon neutralized the Iron Bugs and the Leprechaun finished them off, the five Iron Bugs were subdued in an instant.
1502700024.korean: - 용이 철충을 무력화하고 레프리콘이 마무리하는 깔끔한 연계에, 다섯 마리의 철충은 순식간에 제압됐다.

1502700025.english: However, just then, a still-moving Iron Bug larva burst out of the broken core and charged toward the Leprechaun.
1502700025.korean: - 그런데 그때 부서진 코어 속에서 아직 움직이는 철충의 유충이 튀어나와 레프리콘을 향해 달려들었다.

1502700027.english: gathered strength in my legs and charged forward as if exploding, sending the larva flying with a kick just before it could touch the leprechaun.
1502700027.korean: - 나는 다리에 힘을 모아 폭발시키듯 돌진해 유충이 레프리콘에 닿기 직전 발차기로 날려버렸다.

1502700028.english: The larva flew away with a tremendous impact and crashed into the wall, cracking it, and I didn't let my guard down, so I pulled out my pistol and finished off the larva.
1502700028.korean: - 유충은 엄청난 충격으로 날아가 벽에 금이 갈 정도로 부딪쳤고, 나는 방심하지 않고 권총을 꺼내어 유충을 마무리했다.

1502700030.english: Excuse me, Your Excellency... Thank you for your help.

1502700032.english: We must save everyone before it's too late!
1502700032.korean: - 더 늦기 전에 모두를 구해야만 한다!

1502700036.english: It's a relief you weren't hurt.

1502700037.english: Let's hurry, more Iron Bugs are coming.

1502800002.english: Hahaha... I still have a long way to go!!

1502800003.english: Hey, if you think I'm going to run away, you'd better give up.
1502800003.korean: 이봐, 혹시라도 내가 도망칠 거라고 생각한다면 포기하는 게 좋을 거야.

1502800004.english: I know you're watching from somewhere.
1502800004.korean: 어딘가에서 지켜보고 있다는 거 다 알아.

1502800006.english: Never stepping forward himself. Always hiding behind the scenes, doing things where you never know what he's plotting.
1502800006.korean: 본인이 직접 나서는 일 없이. 늘 뒤에 숨어 뭘 꾸미고 있는지 모를 일을 하고 말이야.

1502800007.english: Huh? Isn't that right? You coward.

1502800008.english: don't know what your purpose was in attacking me, but keep in mind that since you are hostile toward me, I won't let you get away with it easily.
1502800008.korean: 무슨 목적으로 네가 나를 공격했는지 모르겠지만, 나를 적대한 이상 쉽게 넘어가지 않을 거라는 걸 명심하라고.

1502800009.english: You shouldn't underestimate our Poseidon Industries.
1502800009.korean: 우리 포세이돈 인더스트리를 우습게 보면 안 될 거야.

1502800010.english: Coordinates… confirmed… done! Target… locked… done! All salvo! Fire!
1502800010.korean: 좌표… 확인… 완료! 목표… 고정… 완료!&n전탄! 발사!

1502800011.english: … So you're finally here. You're very late.

1502800012.english: We are already in a crisis, so what do you intend to do by provoking the enemy?
1502800012.korean: 안 그래도 위기의 순간인데 적을 도발해서 어쩌자는 거예요.

1502800013.english: And it looks like the Kestos Himas is overloaded, doesn't it? I told you several times to take good care of it.
1502800013.korean: 그리고 보아하니 케스토스 히마스에 과부하가 온 거죠?&n그러게 평소에 관리를 잘해놓으라고 몇 번이나 말했잖아요.

1502800014.english: Seriously... is nagging the first thing you say the moment you see me?

1502800016.english: Of course, it’s only natural since you’re behaving in a way that deserves nagging. If you think you can run away, I’m telling you to give up.
1502800016.korean: 그야 잔소리를 들을 행동을 하니 당연하죠.&n뭐가 도망칠 거라고 생각한다면 포기하라는 거예요.

1502800017.english: I'm telling you, if you can run away, just run away!
1502800017.korean: 도망칠 수 있다면 그냥 도망치란 말이에요!

1502800018.english: Gamma! Are you alright!? Don't worry! I brought Merope with me!
1502800018.korean: 감마 님! 괜찮으세요!? 걱정하지 마세요!&n제가 메로페 님을 데려왔으니까요!

1502800019.english: Rode, when did I tell you to call that little brat? You just called him on your own accord. Get ready to be punished later.
1502800019.korean: 로데, 내가 언제 꼬맹이 녀석을 부르라고 했지?&n멋대로 부르고 말이야. 나중에 벌 받을 준비나 해라.

1502800020.english: What!? Why!? Did I do something wrong!?
1502800020.korean: 네에!? 어째서요!? 저 뭔가 잘못한 건가요!?

1502800021.english: Nagging and punishment can wait until later. You can still move, right? Surely you aren't going to make a weak excuse about being unable to move anymore, are you?
1502800021.korean: 잔소리도 벌도 지금은 나중이에요.&n아직 움직일 수 있으시죠? 설마 더는 못 움직이겠다는 약한 소리를 하진 않겠죠?

1502800022.english: Haha, that's a bit disappointing. It hasn't been that long since you left your position as my adjutant, and you've already forgotten about me?
1502800022.korean: 하핫, 이거 섭섭한데?&n내 부관 자리를 떠난 지 얼마나 됐다고 나에 대해서 벌써 까먹었나?

1502800023.english: That can't be true. The problem is that I know it all too well. Because I know he is the one who would enjoy this situation more than anyone else.
1502800023.korean: 그럴 리가요. 너무나도 잘 알고 있어서 문제예요.&n이런 상황에서 그 누구보다 즐길 사람이란 걸 아니까 말이죠.

1502800024.english: Hahaha! Yeah, that's right. You're absolutely right! Just like a former adjutant, you really know how to make my heart flutter.
1502800024.korean: 하하하! 그래 맞아. 그 말대로야!&n전 부관 아니랄까 봐 역시 날 설레게 하는 법을 잘 알고 있어.

1502800025.english: Excuse me... Lady Gamma? Lady Merope? It looks like a battle is about to break out at any moment... Weren't you supposed to rescue Lady Gamma and escape?
1502800025.korean: 저기… 감마 님? 메로페 님?&n당장이라도 전투할 것 같은 분위기인데… 감마 님을 구출해서 도망치는 게 아니었나요?

1502800026.english: Ha! Compared to that, for a guy called the temporary adjutant to be like this…
1502800026.korean: 하! 그에 비해 임시 부관이라는 놈이 이래서야…

1502800027.english: Rode... it's easier if you give up.

1502800029.english: After several battles, we arrived at our destination, the hangar.
1502800029.korean: - 몇 번의 전투 끝에 우리는 목적지인 격납고에 도착했다.

1502800030.english: And as expected, Orca members were lying unconscious there.
1502800030.korean: - 그리고 예상대로 그곳에는 오르카 대원들이 쓰러져 있었다.

1502800031.english: My Lord! Give the order immediately!

1502800032.english: At that moment, a tearing roar filled the entire hangar.
1502800032.korean: - 그 순간 소리가 찢어지는 듯한 굉음이 격납고 전체를 가득 채웠다.

1502800035.english: Looking around, numerous speakers throughout the hangar were emitting interfering sound waves.
1502800035.korean: - 주변을 둘러보자 격납고 곳곳에서 다수의 스피커가 방해 음파를 내뿜고 있었다.

1502800036.english: Disruption using speakers… Do you realize my command can break the brainwashing? Are you trying to buy time?
1502800036.korean: - 스피커를 이용한 방해… 내 명령이 세뇌를 풀 수 있다는 걸 알고 있어?&n시간을 벌 셈인가.

1502800037.english: Of course! But... it looks like it will take some time.
1502800037.korean: 물론이오!&n하지만... 시간이 좀 걸릴 것 같소.

1502800038.english: As the dragon was about to step forward, a large number of iron bugs appeared as if they had been waiting and blocked the path.
1502800038.korean: - 용이 나서려고 하자 기다렸다는 듯이 다수의 철충들이 나타나 길을 가로막았다.

1502800039.english: The dragon has no means to attack the speaker from a distance right now... Even with Leprechaun's and my guns, it's hard to take down a speaker protected by a Chick Shield at this distance...
1502800039.korean: - 용은 지금 원거리에서 스피커를 공격할 수단은 없어...&n나와 레프리콘의 총으로도 이 거리에서 칙 실더의 보호를 받는 스피커를 쓰러트리기 어려워…

1502800040.english: Damn it, we've come this far. Can we take care of them all before the Iron Bugs swarm in?
1502800040.korean: - 젠장, 여기까지 왔는데.&n철충들이 이곳으로 몰려오기 전에 전부 처리할 수 있을까?

1502800041.english: - Or let's go with Plan B as is…

1502800043.english: Just then, with a shout from behind, something massive burst forth and clashed with the swarm of Iron Bugs blocking the path, pushing them back.
1502800043.korean: - 그때 뒤에서 외침과 함께 거대한 무언가가 튀어나와 길을 가로 막고 있는 철충 무리와 격돌하며 밀어내었다.

1502800045.english: If you cannot defeat the enemy even with firepower you thought was sufficient... let's consider whether the firepower might be insufficient.
1502800045.korean: 충분하다고 생각했던 화력을 가지고도 적을 쓰러트릴 수 없다면… 화력이 부족한 게 아닐까 생각해봅시다.

1502800046.english: And this time, a rocket flew out with the sound of heavy weapon fire, piercing the Chick Shield's protection and shattering the speaker into pieces.
1502800046.korean: - 그리고 이번에는 중화기 발사음과 함께 로켓이 날아가, 칙 실더의 보호를 뚫고 스피커를 산산조각을 냈다.

1502800048.english: Alcyone Appears to Protect Master, Even Amidst Raging Storms and Waves!
1502800048.korean: 폭풍우와 파도가 몰아쳐도 주인님을 지키기 위해 알키오네 등장!

1502800049.english: Arthur! I'm not late, am I? Here comes Orca's cutie, Merlin!
1502800049.korean: 아서! 내가 늦진 않았지? 오르카의 귀염둥이 멀린 등장이야!

1502800050.english: I have a lot to say, but for now, we have to knock those speakers down, right?
1502800050.korean: 하고 싶은 얘기는 많지만, 지금은 우선 저 스피커 들을 쓰러트려야 하는 거지?

1502800052.english: Dance Captain! I'll protect Master! In the meantime!
1502800052.korean: 무용 대장! 주인님은 내가 지킬게! 그 틈에!

1502800054.english: Merlin's heavy weapon attack knocked down the speakers on the upper floor, and the dragon easily jumped over the Iron Bugs blocking the path and cut down all the speakers on the first floor.
1502800054.korean: - 멀린의 중화기 공격으로 윗층에 있는 스피커들이 쓰러졌고, 용은 길을 가로막은 철충들을 가볍게 뛰어넘어 1층에 있는 스피커들을 모조리 베어넘겼다.

1502800055.english: With this, there is no speaker that can interfere with my command.
1502800055.korean: - 이걸로 내 명령을 방해할 스피커는 없다.

1502800059.english: Your Excellency! I'm counting on you!

1502800060.english: My desperate scream echoed throughout the entire hangar where the crew members were.
1502800060.korean: - 내 필사의 외침이 대원들이 있는 격납고 전체로 울려퍼졌다.

1502800062.english: Hey! Can you handle the speaker?

1502800064.english: Even Merlin? How did both of you get here?

1502900001.english: Whoaah~~! Lord Gamma~! Lord Merope~! More Iron Bugs are swarming in from the 1 o'clock and 9 o'clock directions~!
1502900001.korean: 후에에엥~~! 감마 님~! 메로페 님~!&n1시 방향이랑 9시 방향에서 철충이 더 몰려오고 있어요~!

1502900002.english: It's a total crisis! We don't have much ammo left... I'm telling you, it's over!
1502900002.korean: 완전 위기에요~~! 탄약도 이제 얼마 안 남았고…&n이젠 끝이라고요~!

1502900003.english: Rode, just hold on a little longer. Your master will be here soon.
1502900003.korean: 로데 조금만 더 버텨 봐요.&n곧 주인님이 오실 거예요.

1502900004.english: What's the problem with that? If you run out of ammo, fight hand-to-hand.
1502900004.korean: 그게 뭐가 문제지?&n탄약이 다 떨어졌다면 육탄전으로 싸워라.

1502900005.english: That’s impossible, impossible, impossible! If I fight hand-to-hand, I’ll die from just one hit!
1502900005.korean: 무리 무리 무리 무리에요~!&n제가 육탄전으로 싸우면 한 대만 맞아도 죽을 거라고요~!

1502900007.english: (…I can probably hold out for a few more minutes… but it’s true that the situation isn’t good.)
1502900007.korean: (…앞으로 몇 분 정도는 더 버틸 수 있겠지만… 좋지 않은 상황인건 맞아.)

1502900008.english: (At least these two before it's too late…)

1502900011.english: Hmm... I haven't said everything yet, though?

1502900012.english: It's obvious. You're trying to tell me to leave this place to you and Rode and me to leave, aren't you?
1502900012.korean: 뻔하죠, 여기는 자기에게 맡기고 저랑 로데는 이탈하라는 그런 말을 하려는 거잖아요?

1502900014.english: Besides, I am no longer Gamma's subordinate but a member of Orca, so I don't need to take orders.
1502900014.korean: 애초에 저는 이제 감마 님의 부관이 아니라 오르카의 대원이니 명령을 들을 필요가 없죠.

1502900015.english: If that's the case, there wouldn't be any reason for you to come over to help me one by one and nag me, would there?
1502900015.korean: 그렇다면 일일이 나를 도우러 찾아와 잔소리를 할 이유도 없을텐데?

1502900016.english: I told you. I said I would come to repay you for keeping your promise.

1502900017.english: Was that the case? I don't remember.

1502900018.english: You told me to do as I please. So I came to help you as I please.
1502900018.korean: 마음대로 하라고 하셨죠.&n그래서 마음대로 도와드리러 온 거예요.

1502900019.english: The fact that I am alive like this right now... and that I joined Orca and reunited with Alcyone...
1502900019.korean: 제가 지금 이렇게 살아있는 것도... 오르카에 합류해서 알키오네 언니와 재회한 것도…

1502900020.english: Being able to say goodbye to my older sisters... that was all...
1502900020.korean: 언니들에게 작별 인사를 할 수 있었던 것도… 전부…

1502900021.english: It is because Gamma was there.

1502900022.english: So, I won't let go until I've repaid you!
1502900022.korean: 그러니까 보답을 하기 전까지 절대 떨어지지 않을 테니까요!

1502900023.english: And you don't have to worry.

1502900025.english: Because you are an amazing person who always accomplishes things, even if they seem impossible!
1502900025.korean: 불가능이라고 생각되는 일이라도 반드시 해내는 멋진 분이시니까요!

1502900026.english: Platoons 1 and 2, head toward the 1 o'clock direction! Platoons 3 and 4, join me in blocking the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) at the 9 o'clock direction! The rest of you, keep watch from the rear and support our allies!
1502900026.korean: 1, 2소대는 1시 방향을! 3, 4 소대는 나와 함께 9시 방향의 철충을 막는다!&n나머지는 후방에서 경계하며 아군을 지원한다!

1502900027.english: Everyone, pull yourself together! The humiliation suffered at the hands of the Iron Bugs! We absolutely cannot take it lightly!
1502900027.korean: 다들 정신 똑바로 차려라! 철충들에게 당한 굴욕! 절대 가벼이 여길 수 없다!

1502900028.english: Show them! Our true potential! Make them realize! Who we are!
1502900028.korean: 놈들에게 보여줘라! 우리의 저력을!&n깨닫게 해줘라! 우리가 어떤 존재인지를!

1502900029.english: Steel Line Unit! This time, we will defend this place at all costs!
1502900029.korean: 스틸 라인 부대! 이번에야 말로 이곳을 반드시 사수한다!

1502900031.english: Captain? Aren't you going to give any orders? Everyone is waiting for your commands.
1502900031.korean: 대장님? 아무런 지휘도 안하실 겁니까?&n모두 대장님의 명령만 기다리고 있습니다.

1502900033.english: Yes, I can feel it. The Captain's rage, which could never be felt through the Commander Frame.
1502900033.korean: 네, 느껴집니다.&n커맨더 프레임을 통해 느껴질리가 없는 대장님의 분노가 말이죠.

1502900034.english: In that case, I have only one order to give to everyone.
1502900034.korean: 그렇다면 내가 모두에게 내릴 명령은 하나 뿐이야.

1502900035.english: Annihilate all enemies under my command!
1502900035.korean: 내 지휘에 따라 모든 적을 섬멸해!

1502900036.english: … So you’ve finally arrived, Commander of Orca.

1502900037.english: Who are you worrying about right now? This much is no problem.
1502900037.korean: 지금 누굴 걱정하는 거지? 이 정도는 문제 없어.

1502900040.english: Now, you’ll have to pay the price for messing with our squad, won’t you?
1502900040.korean: - 자, 이제 우리 대원들을 건드린 보답을 해야겠지?

1502900041.english: My Lord, the Nexus has revealed itself!

1502900042.english: Just then, a connector appeared at the front where the battle was in full swing.
1502900042.korean: - 그때 한창 전투가 벌어지는 전방에 연결체가 모습을 드러냈다.

1502900043.english: And he assumed a posture as if to emit an unknown signal, just like when he brainwashed everyone.
1502900043.korean: - 그리고 모두를 세뇌 시켰을 때처럼 알 수 없는 신호를 내뿜으려는 자세를 취했다.

1502900044.english: I let out a thrust forward without any hesitation, and shouted to everyone the moment the connector emitted a signal.
1502900044.korean: - 나는 아무런 망설임도 없이 전방을 향해 내질렀고, 연결체가 신호를 내뿜는 것과 동시에 모두에게 외쳤다.

1502900046.english: Unlike before, the Orca members did not fall into a brainwashed state, and the connector looked bewildered upon seeing this.
1502900046.korean: - 이전과 달리 오르카 대원들은 세뇌 상태에 빠지지 않았고, 그 모습을 본 연결체는 당황한 모습을 보였다.

1502900047.english: As soon as I appeared at the front, the surrounding Iron Bugs rushed toward me in unison...
1502900047.korean: - 내가 전방에 나타나자 주변에 있던 철충들은 일제히 내쪽으로 달려들었고…

1502900048.english: Whose permission do you have to approach the master right now?
1502900048.korean: 지금 누구의 허락을 받고 주인님에게 접근 하는 거죠?

1502900049.english: Just then, Black Lilith descended from the sky, raining down a barrage of bullets, and mercilessly attacked the Iron Bug approaching me, blowing them all away.
1502900049.korean: - 그때 하늘에서 총알 세례를 퍼부으며 블랙 리리스가 내려와,&n내게 접근하는 철충들을 사정없이 공격하여 모두 날려버렸다.

1502900050.english: To the Iron軸 (Connector) over there. I commend you for leaving the scar of humiliation and shame of failing to protect Master from me.
1502900050.korean: 거기 있는 연결체 철충.&n제게서 주인님을 지켜드리지 못했다는 굴욕과 치욕의 상처를 남긴 건 칭찬해 드리죠.

1502900051.english: You'd better brace yourself... My anger is at its peak right now, to the point where it can't even be compared to anything before.
1502900051.korean: 각오하시는 게.. 좋을 겁니다...&n지금 저의 분노는 지금까지와 비교도 할 수 없을 정도로 최고조랍니다.

1502900052.english: Yes, I am fine, Master. Normally, I would not leave you to command in such a dangerous place, but I understand the situation.
1502900052.korean: 네, 전 괜찮습니다 주인님.&n본래라면 주인님을 이런 위험한 곳에서 지휘하게 내버려둘 수 없지만, 상황은 이해했습니다.

1502900053.english: Please leave the safety to me, and I ask you to command the troops. I will make sure not a single speck of dust touches you, Master.
1502900053.korean: 안전은 부디 저에게 맡겨주시고, 대원들의 지휘를 부탁드립니다.&n주인님에게는 먼지 한 톨 닿지 않게 할테니까요.

1502900054.english: The brainwashed Orca members have returned to their original selves. The enemy's brainwashing ability no longer works.
1502900054.korean: - 세뇌되었던 오르카 대원들은 다시 원래대로 돌아왔다.&n적의 세뇌 능력은 이제 통하지 않는다.

1502900055.english: Now it is our turn to show them our strength.
1502900055.korean: - 이제부터는 우리의 힘을 놈들에게 보여줄 차례다.

1502900056.english: Sorry I'm late. You look really tired. Are you okay?

1502900059.english: I'll leave Gamma to you. Leave it to us from now on.

1502900060.english: Everyone, focus only on my orders!

1502900061.english: There is no need to listen to the Iron Bug's signals! Ignore them completely!
1502900061.korean: 철충의 신호 따위는 들을 필요 없어! 철저히 무시해라!

1502900062.english: From now on, exterminate the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) according to my orders!
1502900062.korean: 지금부터 내 지시에 따라 철충들을 섬멸한다!

1502900063.english: I won't just sit back and take it like before.
1502900063.korean: 이전처럼 가만히 당하고만 있지 않을 거다.

1503000001.english: The battle between Orca and the Iron Bug continued for some time. After a desperate struggle, the Nexus Iron Bug fell, signaling the end.
1503000001.korean: - 오르카와 철충의 전투는 한동안 계속되었고.&n처절한 사투 끝에 연결체 철충이 쓰러지면서 그 끝을 알렸다.

1503000002.english: Battle over! Keep watch around the Steel Line unit and stand by! There might still be moving Iron Bugs!
1503000002.korean: 전투 종료! 스틸 라인 부대 주변을 경계하며 대기해라!&n아직 움직이는 철충이 있을 수도 있다!

1503000003.english: While there are many lightly injured and several members with serious injuries, fortunately, none of the members are in life-threatening condition.
1503000003.korean: 경상자 다수에 중상을 입은 대원도 여럿 있지만, 다행히 목숨에 지장이 있는 대원은 없습니다.

1503000005.english: Marie hesitated, turning her head slightly as if to say something to me. It seemed that, just like the dragon, Marie was still holding the memory of being brainwashed in her heart.
1503000005.korean: - 마리는 나에게 무슨 할 말이 있는지 살짝 고개를 돌리며 머뭇거렸다.&n아무래도 용이 그랬던 것처럼 마리도 세뇌를 당했던 일을 마음에 두고 있는 것 같았다.

1503000009.english: Haha, I see. Then I will continue to keep watch over the surroundings until safety is confirmed.
1503000009.korean: 후후, 그렇군요.&n그럼 안전이 확인될 때까지 계속해서 주변을 경계하겠습니다.

1503000010.english: The fighting on the Northern Front is over. But is it really over?
1503000010.korean: - 북부 전선에서의 전투는 끝났다.&n하지만 이걸로 정말 끝난 걸까?

1503000011.english: The Nexus I fought this time feels very different from the Iron Bug I've fought so far. Not only the brainwashing technology, but the Bio-roids feel like they aren't Iron Bug at all...
1503000011.korean: - 이번에 싸운 연결체는 지금까지 싸워왔던 철충과는 많은 다른 느낌이 든다.&n바이오로이드는 세뇌하는 기술도 그렇지만 마치 철충이 아닌…

1503000012.english: - It feels just like when I fought the Lemonade creature…
1503000012.korean: - 레모네이드 개체와 싸웠을 때와 같은 기분이야…

1503000013.english: saw the broken body of the connector, sensed something strange, and slowly approached it.
1503000013.korean: - 나는 연결체의 부서진 신체를 보고 이상한 낌새를 느껴 천천히 다가갔다.

1503000014.english: "- The back of the body is split open? It's like… something came out from the inside… No way…!"
1503000014.korean: - 몸의 뒷부분이 갈라져 있어?&n이건 마치… 몸 안쪽에서 무언가가 나온 것 같은… 설마…!

1503000016.english: There haven't been any reports of anything coming out of the connector so far. Then what on earth is this thing? What on earth came out of it?
1503000016.korean: - 지금까지 연결체의 안에서 무언가 나왔다는 보고는 없었어.&n그렇다면 이 녀석은 대체 뭐지? 대체 안에서 뭐가 나온 거야?

1503000017.english: The fact that they didn't show themselves means they have no intention of attacking. So, did they run away? Where did they run to?
1503000017.korean: - 모습을 드러내지 않았다는 건 공격하려는 의지는 없어.&n그렇다면 도망친 건가? 어디로 도망친 거지?

1503000019.english: Gamma, are you okay? You look very tired.

1503000020.english: Hmm, you say I look tired?

1503000021.english: Yes, to be honest, quite a lot.

1503000022.english: Of course you must be exhausted. If you acted like nothing happened after all that fuss, that would actually be the bigger problem. It’s not like you’re a bug character or anything.
1503000022.korean: 당연히 지칠 만도 하죠.&n그렇게 난리를 쳤는데 아무렇지도 않다면 오히려 그게 더 문제라고요. 무슨 버그 캐릭터도 아니고.

1503000023.english: Personally, I would like this to be an opportunity for you to behave a bit. What do you think?
1503000023.korean: 저로서는 이걸 계기로 좀 얌전해지셨으면 좋겠는데 어떠세요?

1503000024.english: Hahaha, you've become even bolder since going to Orca. You've become even more uninhibited in your speech.
1503000024.korean: 하하하, 오르카로 가더니 더 당돌해졌구나.&n말하는 게 더 거침이 없어졌어.

1503000025.english: It's because of that person in Orca who was supposed to be Poseidon's predecessor's lieutenant. He keeps showing up all the time challenging me to a contest to see who is the better lieutenant, and it's just so annoying.
1503000025.korean: 오르카에 있는 포세이돈의 전의 전 부관 예정이었던 누구 때문에요.&n수시로 찾아와서 누가 더 뛰어난 부관인지 승부를 내자고 하는데 얼마나 귀찮은지 몰라요.

1503000028.english: I was right here! I was just too busy fighting the Iron Bug to notice, but I've been right by your side the whole time. There's no way I, Merlin, wouldn't be here where Captain Gamma is!
1503000028.korean: 있었지! 철충이라 싸우느라 정신이 없어서 그렇지 계속 옆에 있었잖아.&n감마 대장님이 계시는 곳에 이 멀린이 없을 수야 없지!

1503000029.english: Captain Gamma, are you okay? Let me support you!
1503000029.korean: 감마 대장님 괜찮으세요? 제가 부축해 드릴게요~!

1503000030.english: For your information, Alcyone was there too!

1503000031.english: Yeah, of course Alcyone knew! Thank you, sister, for keeping everyone safe.
1503000031.korean: 응, 당연히 알키오네 언니는 알고 있었지!&n고마워 언니, 계속 모두를 지켜줘서.

1503000032.english: As expected, the only one who cares about this older sister the most is our adorable youngest~ Alcyone is so touched.
1503000032.korean: 역시 이 언니를 제일 생각해 주는 건 우리 귀염둥이 막내밖에 없구나~&n알키오네 언니는 감격이야.

1503000033.english: And protecting everyone is a given for the Guardians series! I told you I would protect everyone. You know that, right? The Guardians series is absolutely
1503000033.korean: 그리고 모두를 지키는 건 가디언 시리즈라면 당연하지! 내가 말했잖아 모두를 지키겠다고.&n알고 있지? 가디언 시리즈는 절대로

1503000034.english: You mean you won't break a promise?

1503000036.english: … Seriously, this is chaotic… Is it always like this for you Orcas?
1503000036.korean: …정말이지, 정신이 없군…&n너희 오르카는 항상 이런 느낌인가?

1503000038.english: Haha, I wouldn't say it's always like this, but generally, the atmosphere is right.
1503000038.korean: 후후, 항상이라고는 할 수 없지만, 대게 이런 분위기는 맞소.

1503000039.english: However, I don't think this bustling atmosphere is necessarily a bad thing. What do you think, Gamma?
1503000039.korean: 하지만, 이런 시끌벅적한 분위기도 꼭 나쁘지만은 않다고 생각하는데 감마 그대는 어떻게 생각하오?

1503000040.english: … Yeah, it doesn't seem that bad…

1503000041.english: … Gamma, I will ask you once again right here and now.
1503000041.korean: …감마, 지금 이 자리에서 다시 한번 물어보겠소.

1503000043.english: Join Orca and fight alongside your lord against a greater enemy.
1503000043.korean: 오르카에 합류하여 주군과 함께 더 큰 적과 맞서 싸우시오.

1503000044.english: You said this back then: that you follow someone who brings you endless battles.
1503000044.korean: 그대는 그때 이렇게 말했소. 자신에게 끝없는 싸움을 가져다주는 사람을 따른다고.

1503000045.english: Of course, the Lord is not the type to actively engage in battles, as you said.
