1503000045.korean: 물론, 주군은 그대가 말한 대로 적극적으로 싸움을 벌이는 성격은 아니오.

1503000046.english: However, as we saw in this fight, it is also true that he is someone who never backs down for the sake of our Orca.
1503000046.korean: 하지만 이번 싸움에서 보았듯이, 우리 오르카를 위해서라면 절대로 물러서지 않는 분이란 것 또한 사실이오.

1503000047.english: As long as you remain by your lord's side, things that satisfy you will continue to happen, even if you do not want to. After all, it has always been that way until now.
1503000047.korean: 주군의 곁에 있으면 그대가 만족할 일이 싫어도 계속 일어날 거요.&n지금까지 계속 그래왔으니 말이오.

1503000048.english: And… I didn’t mean to go this far, but…
1503000048.korean: 그리고… 이런 말까지 할 생각은 없었소만…

1503000049.english: If it is my lord, surely… if it is a battle of the night where something other than blood flows… surely you will be satisfied… no, rather, you will not be able to handle it.
1503000049.korean: 주군이라면 분명… 피가 흐르는 싸움이 아닌 다른 게 흐르는 밤의 싸움이라면…&n분명 그대도 만족… 아니 오히려 감당할 수 없을 거요.

1503000052.english: This is insane! I never thought such a sound would come out of that dragon! Did it get influenced by Merlin or something?
1503000052.korean: 이거 대박인데! 그 용에게서 저런 소리가 나올 줄이야!&n멀린 녀석에게 영향이라도 받은 거냐?

1503000054.english: Hehe... Yeah... So what? It's the same for both of us.
1503000054.korean: 크큭… 그래… 뭐 어때 피차일반이라는 거지.

1503000055.english: … Then I will return to Poseidon Base for now. I also need to check on the Annihilator's status.
1503000055.korean: …그럼 나는 일단 포세이돈 기지로 돌아가겠다.&n어나이얼레이터의 상태도 확인해야 하니.

1503000056.english: Gamma, haven't you heard the answer yet?

1503000057.english: No matter what happens, you're not going to decide whether to join or not until this matter is settled, right? I was looking forward to the things you just mentioned.
1503000057.korean: 뭐가 어찌 됐든, 이번 일이 마무리되어야 합류하든가 말든가 할 거 아니야?&n네가 지금 얘기했던 것들 기대하고 있었어.

1503000060.english: I wonder what's going on... So many people gathered all of a sudden, it's completely chaotic...
1503000060.korean: 뭐가 어떻게 돌아가고 있는 걸까요…&n갑자기 너무 많은 분이 모여 드셔서 정신이 하나도 없어요…

1503000061.english: Gamma seems to keep talking about something... Could it be that they are planning to join Orca?
1503000061.korean: 감마 님은 뭔가 계속 얘기하시는 것 같고… 혹시 오르카로 합류하시려는 걸까요?

1503000062.english: Ah!? If Gamma joins, I'll naturally be joining Orca too... Then I'll be able to continue being with Merope, right!?
1503000062.korean: 앗!? 만약 감마 님이 합류하신다면 자연스럽게 저도 오르카로 합류하게 되는 거고…&n그럼 메로페 님과 계속 함께할 수 있는 거겠죠!?

1503000063.english: So that Gamma may join Orca! So that Gamma may join Orca! So that Gamma may join Orca! So that Gamma may join Orca!
1503000063.korean: 감마 님이 오르카에 합류하도록! 감마 님이 오르카에 합류하도록!&n감마 님이 오르카에 합류하도록! 감마 님이 오르카에 합류하도록!

1503000065.english: Just now… didn’t something pass under that eye over there?
1503000065.korean: 지금… 저쪽 눈 밑 속에서 뭔가 지나가지 않았나요?

1503000066.english: And it seems like there is some commotion ahead. Are they looking for something?
1503000066.korean: 그리고 전방 쪽이 뭔가 소란스러운 것 같아요.&n무언가를 찾는 걸까요?

1503000067.korean: 어…? 메로페 님 뒤쪽에 저건…&n안 돼!!

1503000070.english: At the sound of a loud voice coming from behind, I hurriedly ran toward the source of the sound.
1503000070.korean: - 뒤쪽에서 들려온 큰 목소리에는 나는 서둘러 소리가 난 쪽으로 달려갔다.

1503000071.english: Then, there was the figure of Gamma, who was embracing Merope and being stabbed by something that resembled an Iron Bug larva but was completely different.
1503000071.korean: - 그러자 그곳에는 메로페를 감싸 안고서 철충의 유충과 유사하지만, 전혀 다른 무언가에 찔린 감마의 모습이 있었다.

1503000073.english: Tch, did I fail to hit it because my movements got sluggish...!

1503000074.english: Ugh… What is…!? Merope! Get away from me! Hurry!

1503000075.english: Something that looked like a larva instantly wrapped around Gamma's body and Kestos Himas.
1503000075.korean: - 유충으로 보이는 무언가는 순식간에 감마의 몸과 케스토스 히마스를 휘감았다.

1503000076.english: - You're not infecting them, are you!?

1503000078.english: Gamma! I will cut you down now!

1503000079.english: The dragon quickly drew its sword and swung it at the larva clinging to Gamma.
1503000079.korean: - 용은 재빨리 검을 빼 들어 감마에게 달라붙은 유충을 향해 검을 휘둘렀다.

1503000083.english: Just before the Dragon Sword touched the larva, Gamma's Kestos Himas blocked the attack.
1503000083.korean: - 용의 검이 유충에 닿기 직전 감마의 케스토스 히마스가 검격을 막았다.

1503000084.english: [c][FF0000]Do not... interfere... with... the great... experiment... of evolution... [-][/c]

1503000086.english: My Lord! What should I do?

1503000087.english: It appeared that the larvae were wrapping around Gamma's body, centering on Kestos Himas, infecting and controlling it.
1503000087.korean: - 유충은 케스토스 히마스를 중심으로 감마의 몸을 휘감아 감염시켜 몸을 조종하고 있는 것 같았다.

1503000088.english: There hasn't been any significant movement yet. In fact, it seems like it's inhibiting movement. Is Gamma resisting it? If so...
1503000088.korean: - 아직은 큰 움직임이 없어. 오히려 움직이는 걸 억제하는 것 같은데?&n감마가 저항하고 있는 건가? 그렇다면…

1503000089.english: Although he is in an unstable state, the opponent is Lemonade Gamma, the embodiment of rage. You must never let your guard down.
1503000089.korean: - 불안정한 상태라고는 하나 상대는 분노의 화신인 레모네이드 감마다.&n절대 방심해서는 안 된다.

1503000090.english: - The final battle on the northern front begins.

1503000091.english: Mari, what is the extent of the damage?

1503000093.english: I know what you're trying to say. Leona and Lilith... they must all feel the same way.
1503000093.korean: 하고 싶은 말은 알아. 레오나도 리리스도… 모두 같은 마음일 거야.

1503000094.english: I also have a lot I want to say to everyone.
1503000094.korean: 나 역시 모두에게 하고 싶은 말이 잔뜩 있어.

1503000095.english: But right now, the fact that everyone is safe like this is enough for me.
1503000095.korean: 하지만 지금은, 이렇게 모두가 무사하다는 사실만으로 나는 충분해.

1503000096.english: I just did what I had to do as everyone's commander.
1503000096.korean: 모두의 사령관으로서 해야 할 일을 했을 뿐이야.

1503000099.english: Something that popped out of the connector is hiding somewhere! We have to find it!
1503000099.korean: 어딘가에 연결체에서 튀어나온 무언가가 숨어있어! 찾아야 해!

1503000100.english: Dragon! Everyone, get away for now! Others could get caught up in the infection!
1503000100.korean: 용! 모두 일단 떨어져! 다른 사람도 감염에 휘말릴 수도 있어!

1503100001.english: The resistance of the Iron Bug that infected and took over Gamma's body was formidable.
1503100001.korean: - 감마의 몸을 감염시켜 빼앗은 철충의 저항은 만만치 않았다.

1503100002.english: - Even if you try to remove the infected area, it is not easy to approach due to indiscriminate destructive attacks.
1503100002.korean: - 감염된 부위를 제거하려고 해도 무차별적인 파괴 공격에 접근하기가 쉽지 않다.

1503100003.english: [c][FF0000]… Just a little… Just a little further… ![-][/c]

1503100004.english: My Lord! The infection is getting worse! At this rate, even Gamma is in danger!
1503100004.korean: 주군! 감염이 점점 심해지고 있소!&n이대로라면 감마도 위험하오!

1503100005.english: As the dragon said, there isn't much time left, and everyone is in danger. It can't be helped, but a decision must be made now.
1503100005.korean: - 용의 말대로 앞으로 시간이 얼마 없고 모두가 위험해진다.&n어쩔 수 없지만, 이제는 결단을 내려야 한다.

1503100006.english: It will harm Gamma, but we have to detach it, even if it means forcibly.
1503100006.korean: - 감마에게 피해가 가겠지만, 억지로라도 떼어내야 해.

1503100007.english: If only I could somehow create a small opening…
1503100007.korean: - 어떻게든 작은 틈을 만들 수만 있다면…

1503100008.english: [c][FF0000]I can achieve perfect evolution in just a little while… ![-][/c]
1503100008.korean: [c][FF0000]앞으로 조금이면 완벽한 진화를 이룰 수 있다…![-][/c]

1503100009.english: Hey, you look really comfortable...? Using someone else's body... however you want...
1503100009.korean: 이봐, 아주 편안해 보이는데…?&n남의 몸을... 멋대로 사용하고 말이야…

1503100010.english: [c][FF0000]What is this? It's supposed to take away control of the body?[-][/c]

1503100011.english: I’m all worked up thanks to you running wild with my body. Thanks to you, my rage is at its peak right now.
1503100011.korean: 네 녀석이 내 몸으로 날뛰어준 덕분에 달아올랐거든.&n덕분에 지금 내 분노는 최고조야.

1503100012.english: Gamma, who had been controlled by the Iron Bug, barely managed to regain his senses and moved his left arm to grab a part of the body of the larva that had fused with Kestos Himas.
1503100012.korean: - 철충에 의해 조종당하던 감마는, 가까스로 정신을 차렸는지 왼팔을 움직여 케스토스 히마스에 융화된 유충의 몸 일부를 붙잡았다.

1503100013.english: If you intended to take my body, you must have been prepared, right? Huh?
1503100013.korean: 내 몸을 빼앗을 생각이었다면 당연히 각오는 했겠지? 응?

1503100014.english: Immediately after that, Gamma's Kestos Himas suddenly began to emit strong light and smoke accompanied by a loud noise.
1503100014.korean: - 그 직후 갑자기 감마의 케스토스 히마스에서 거센소리와 함께, 강한 빛과 연기를 내뿜기 시작했다.

1503100015.english: [c][FF0000]What are you doing!? You're not planning to overload it and call it self-destruction, are you!?[-][/c]
1503100015.korean: [c][FF0000]무슨 짓이지!? 설마 과부하 시켜 자폭이라고 할 셈이냐!?[-][/c]

1503100016.english: Ah!! Right!! Go ahead and entertain me until the very end!
1503100016.korean: 아아!! 그래!! 어디 마지막까지 날 즐겁게 해달라고!

1503100017.english: [c][FF0000]Let go! I said let go! The new evolution to show him! Do not interfere with the great experiment!![-][/c]
1503100017.korean: [c][FF0000]놔라! 놓으란 말이다! 그 분에게 보여드릴 새로운 진화를! 위대한 실험을 방해하지 말란 말이다!![-][/c]

1503100020.english: I drew the 'Commander's Handgun Mk. 217' from the holster and took a purple bullet from my pocket to load it.
1503100020.korean: - 나는 홀스터에서 '사령관 전용 권총 Mk. 217'을 뽑고 주머니에서 보라색 총알을 하나 꺼내 장전했다.

1503100023.english: - Shortly after, a massive explosion occurred due to the overload of the Kestos Himas, and…
1503100023.korean: - 잠시 후, 케스토스 히마스의 과부하로 인한 큰 폭발이 일어났고…

1503100024.english: The final battle on the northern front has ended.

1503100025.english: (I tried not to use it if possible, but I guess it can't be helped)
1503100025.korean: (가급적이면 사용하지 않으려고 했는데 어쩔 수 없나)

1503100026.english: It's going to explode soon! Everyone stay away!!

1503100027.english: Dragon! Lilith! I'll give you a signal!

1503200003.english: That I came to surrender to anger and pursue only endless battles.
1503200003.korean: 내가 분노에 몸을 맡기며 끝없는 싸움만을 추구하게 된 게.

1503200004.english: From the beginning? Or did I want to become that way myself?
1503200004.korean: 처음부터? 아니면 나 자신이 그렇게 되기를 바랐던 건가?

1503200005.english: Lemonade of Rage, created by Chairman Alexandros of Poseidon Industries.
1503200005.korean: 포세이돈 인더스트리의 알렉산드로스 회장에 의해 태어난 분노의 레모네이드.

1503200006.english: I acted according to his rage, madness, and craving for a bloody fight.
1503200006.korean: 그의 분노와 광기, 피가 튀는 싸움을 추구하는 갈망에 따라 나는 행동했고.

1503200007.english: At some point, it soon became a part of myself.
1503200007.korean: 언제부터인가 그것은 곧 나 자신의 일부가 되어있었다.

1503200008.english: All of the Chairman's actions are right, and there is nothing wrong with his will. I represented his actions and will and smashed everything that stood in his way.
1503200008.korean: 회장님의 행동은 모두 옳으며, 그 의지에 틀린 점은 없다.&n나는 그의 행동과 의지를 대변하고 가로막는 모든 걸 박살 냈다.

1503200009.english: That is the reason I was born, the meaning of my existence…
1503200009.korean: 그게 내가 태어난 이유, 존재 의의…

1503200011.english: I thought my existence would be acknowledged. Because I thought he was the only one who would acknowledge me, now that I had completely succumbed to rage and madness.
1503200011.korean: 내 존재를 인정받을 거라고 생각했다.&n그가 이제 완전히 분노와 광기에 빠져버린 나를 인정해 줄 유일한 존재가 그라고 생각했으니까.

1503200012.english: But futilely, that day never came. Until the day I fell into a final sleep from which I could not awaken, in his eyes, I was merely a tool of war, just like the other bioroids.
1503200012.korean: 하지만 허무하게도 그런 날은 오지 않았다.&n깨어날 수 없는 마지막 잠에 빠지는 날까지 그의 앞에서는&n나도 다른 바이오로이드와 마찬가지로 그저 전쟁의 도구일 뿐이었다.

1503200013.english: It is nothing more and nothing less than a horse on the battlefield just like everyone else.
1503200013.korean: 다른 이들과 똑같은 전장의 말, 그 이상도 그 이하도 아니다.

1503200014.english: And so, I shall continue to exist just as I am, thirsting for war, merely as the embodiment of rage…
1503200014.korean: 그렇게 나는 이대로 계속해서 전쟁에 갈증을 느끼는, 그저 분노의 화신으로서 모습을 이어가리라…

1503200017.english: When on earth did I change like this, considering I used to be like that?
1503200017.korean: 그랬던 내가 대체 언제부터 이렇게 바뀌게 된 거지?

1503200018.english: Since I took in the clumsy one who always cries because of their mood?
1503200018.korean: 변덕으로 항상 우는 덜렁이를 거뒀을 때부터?

1503200019.english: Or was it ever since I picked up a kid I thought was useful?
1503200019.korean: 아니면 쓸만하다고 생각된 꼬맹이 녀석을 주웠을 때부터?

1503200022.english: Surrender now and obey my orders.

1503200024.english: At first, I just thought he was a funny person...

1503200025.english: Right… somewhere deep inside, was I wanting to be acknowledged by that guy?
1503200025.korean: 그래… 마음속 어딘가에서 나는 그 녀석에게 인정받고 싶었던 건가?

1503200026.english: As a being, not merely a tool of war or words.
1503200026.korean: 단순한 전쟁의 도구이자 말이 아닌 하나의 존재로서.

1503200027.english: I feel a little... regretful... If this is the ending... I wish I had realized it just a little bit earlier...
1503200027.korean: 조금은… 후회가 되는 군…&n이런 결말이라면… 아주 조금만 더 일찍 깨달았다면 좋았을 텐데…

1503200028.english: Joining the last human, 'Lemonade Gamma, who became a member of Orca'...
1503200028.korean: 마지막 인간에게 합류하여 '오르카의 일원이 된 레모네이드 감마' 라...

1503200029.english: Haha, I guess that doesn't make sense?

1503200030.english: Still… even if it was an illusion that could never be realized, one destined to shatter someday…
1503200030.korean: 그래도… 이루어질 수 없는, 언젠가 부서져 버릴 허상이었을지라도…

1503200031.english: I wanted to stay by their side just a little longer, even just a bit longer... to watch that illusion...
1503200031.korean: 조금만 더, 녀석들의 곁에서 조금이라도 더… 그 허상을 지켜보고 싶었는데…

1503200037.english: How on earth... I was definitely with the Iron Bug...
1503200037.korean: 대체 어떻게… 나는 분명 철충과 함께…

1503200038.english: He's good with words, but Orca's commander...

1503200039.english: I don't remember becoming your member, though.
1503200039.korean: 나는 네 녀석의 대원이 된 기억이 없다만?

1503200040.english: Haha... Seriously... he's such a mischievous fellow.

1503200041.english: Gamma covered his body with his hands, as if he had only just realized his appearance.
1503200041.korean: - 감마는 그제서야 자기 모습을 파악했는지 손으로 몸을 가렸다.

1503200042.english: So what? What do you intend to do after leaving me in this state?
1503200042.korean: 그래서? 나를 이런 꼴로 만들어 뭘 어떻게 할 셈이지?

1503200043.english: Surely you didn't already lay your hands on it while I was asleep, did you? That's a bad taste, Commander of Orca.
1503200043.korean: 설마, 내가 잠들어 있는 동안 이미 손을 댄 건 아니겠지?&n악취미야, 오르카의 사령관.

1503200044.english: Hmm, well, is that really true?

1503200045.english: Considering your immoral and dissolute lifestyle, it is bound to be low.
1503200045.korean: 너의 그 절조 없고 방탕한 생활을 생각하면야 낮을 수밖에 없지.

1503200046.english: Can you say that with your hand on your heart? That you lead a very wholesome and principled life.
1503200046.korean: 가슴에 손을 얹고도 그렇게 말할 수 있나?&n자신은 매우 건전하고 절조 있는 생활을 보내고 있다고 말이야.

1503200047.english: Haha, see! Just look at that. You sneaky little rascal.
1503200047.korean: 하핫, 거 봐! 그거 보라지.&n이 엉큼한 녀석.

1503200048.english: What do you mean, "what did you do"... The new information about you just entered into me... It's obvious you tampered with me, isn't it?
1503200048.korean: 뭘 어떻게 하긴… 지금 나에게 새로 입력된 네 녀석의 정보…&n역시 뭔가 나에게 손을 댄 게 확실하잖아?

1503200049.english: Do I even have a choice? Isn't that right, Chairman of Poseidon?
1503200049.korean: 그런 나에게 선택지라는 게 있나?&n안 그래? 포세이돈의 회장님?

1503200050.english: Haha, on the contrary, it seems my credit is very high.
1503200050.korean: 하하, 반대로 내 신용은 매우 높은가 보군.

1503200056.english: So you need me. Not as me fighting as a tool of war, but as a member fighting to protect everyone.
1503200056.korean: 너는 내가 필요한 거군.&n전쟁의 도구로서 싸우는 내가 아닌, 모두를 지키기 위해 싸우는 한명의 대원으로서.

1503200057.english: Thank you, Commander. For saving me. For telling me that I was needed.
1503200057.korean: 고맙다, 사령관.&n나를 구해줘서. 내가 필요하다고 말해줘서.

1503200058.english: From now on… for as long as possible… I will watch over this illusion you created for me from the sidelines.
1503200058.korean: 앞으로는… 가능한 오랫동안... 네가 만들어준 이 허상을 곁에서 지켜보겠다.

1503200059.english: Master! Is it true that Gamma has woken up?
1503200059.korean: 주인님! 감마 님이 깨어났다는 게 정말이야?

1503200060.english: Ah, you really woke up! Gamma! Are you alright? Do you recognize me?
1503200060.korean: 앗, 정말 깨어났잖아! 감마 님! 괜찮으세요? 저 알아보시겠어요?

1503200061.english: Whoa! Lord Gamma! I'm so glad you woke up! *Sniff* If you hadn't woken up like this, I wouldn't have known what I would have done... *Sniff*...
1503200061.korean: 후에엥~! 감마 님~! 깨어나셔서 정말 다행이에요오~!&n훌쩍, 감마 님이 이대로 깨어나지 않으면 저 어떻게 해야 할지… 몰라서 후엥…

1503200062.english: I'm so relieved that I didn't get fired and left homeless right after becoming a temporary adjutant!
1503200062.korean: 임시 부관이 되자마자 잘리고 길거리에 나앉게 되지 않아서 정말 다행이에요~!

1503200063.english: Th-see... I-I told you...? Lord Gamma is always the strongest, I told you nothing would happen...
1503200063.korean: 그, 그것 봐… 내, 내가 말한 대로지…?&n감마 님은 언제나 최강, 아무 일도 없을 거라니까…

1503200064.english: Considering what you're saying, Merlin, you look more relieved than anyone else? Your body is trembling from the release of tension.
1503200064.korean: 그런 말치고는 누구보다 안도하고 있는데 멀린?&n긴장이 풀려서 몸이 떨고 있잖아.

1503200065.english: So what! Lord Gamma will be joining Orca now! All that remains is to put my ideal into action!
1503200065.korean: 아무렴 어때! 이제 감마 님도 오르카에 합류하실 테니!&n이제 남은 건 내 이상향을 실행하는 일뿐이야!

1503200067.english: Haha, is that so... You're certainly right.

1503200068.english: Gamma smiled quietly as he looked at the three people.
1503200068.korean: - 감마는 세 사람을 바라보며 조용히 웃음을 지었다.

1503200069.english: That laughter is not anger that never disappears, even in the cold.
1503200069.korean: - 그 웃음은 차가운 냉기에도 절대 사라지지 않는 분노가 아닌.

1503200070.english: It was a peaceful smile that melted warmly.

1503200072.english: It's the infirmary on the transport ship.

1503200073.english: Yeah, I'm alive. Though it's the exact opposite of when I was in the cave.
1503200073.korean: 그래, 살아있지. 동굴에서 있었던 그때와는 정반대 상황이지만.

1503200074.english: It would take a long time to explain, so I'll save that for next time...
1503200074.korean: 이야기하자면 기니까 그건 다음에 말하기로 하고…

1503200075.english: The reason is that I would never abandon an Orca member.
1503200075.korean: 이유라면 나는 오르카의 대원을 절대로 버리지 않거든.

1503200076.english: Really? Then did I save someone I shouldn't have?
1503200076.korean: 그래? 그렇다면 나는 구하지 말았어야 할 인물을 구한 건가?

1503200077.english: Don't worry, I didn't touch it. It couldn't be helped because of the treatment.
1503200077.korean: 걱정 마, 손대지 않았으니까. 치료 때문에 어쩔 수 없었어.

1503200078.english: It looks like my credit score is very low.

1503200079.english: I'm telling you, it's not that bad.

1503200081.english: Ahem, my life doesn't really matter. I'm having very productive days.
1503200081.korean: 크흠, 내 생활은 아무래도 좋잖아. 매우 유익한 나날을 보내고 있다고.

1503200082.english: Gamma, what do you plan to do going forward, rather than that right now?
1503200082.korean: 지금은 그보다 감마, 너는 앞으로 어떻게 할 생각이지?

1503200083.english: It was an emergency, so I had no choice. I wouldn't have planned to use it if there hadn't been any problems.
1503200083.korean: 위급 상황이라 어쩔 수 없었어. 문제가 없다면 쓸 예정도 없었고.

1503200084.english: I won't force you. If you want, I'll put it back the way it was.
1503200084.korean: 강제하진 않아. 네가 원한다면 원래대로 되돌려 줄게.

1503200085.english: He's a nuisance, someone I'd rather not get involved with if possible.
1503200085.korean: 성가신 녀석이지, 가능하면 엮이고 싶지 않은 존재고.

1503200087.english: When we fought together as allies, he was more reliable than anyone else.
1503200087.korean: 아군이 되어 같이 싸웠을 때는, 그 누구보다 듬직했어.

1503200088.english: I don't think any other words are needed now. I need you, Gamma.
1503200088.korean: 이제 다른 말은 필요 없겠지. 나는 네가 필요해 감마.

1503200089.english: From now on, fight for both me and Orca, not for your own anger.
1503200089.korean: 이제부터는 자신의 분노가 아닌, 나와 오르카 모두를 위해 싸워줘.

1503200090.english: It's not an illusion. And I didn't create it all by myself.
1503200090.korean: 허상이 아니야. 그리고 나 혼자만이 만든 것도 아니지.

1503300001.english: Wow~ That's amazing! To think a tea party is being held in a place like this!
1503300001.korean: 와아아~ 굉장해요!&n이런 곳에서 다과회가 열리고 있다니!

1503300002.english: On top of that, there are so many delicious-looking desserts!
1503300002.korean: 게다가 맛있어 보이는 디저트가 이렇게나 많이!

1503300003.english: From strawberry shortcake to Mont Blanc, Lamington, tarts, and even macarons! There are countless types of cookies as well!
1503300003.korean: 딸기 쇼트 케이크에 몽블랑, 레밍턴, 타르트, 마카롱까지!&n쿠키 종류도 셀 수 없을 정도에요!

1503300004.english: To think that all the desserts I've only ever seen in magazines are gathered here…! This isn't a dream, is it? No, even if it is a dream, I don't care! When will I ever get another chance to eat something like this!
1503300004.korean: 지금까지 잡지로만 봤던 디저트들이 모두 모여 있다니…!&n이건 꿈이 아니겠죠? 아뇨 꿈이라도 상관 없어요! 이런 걸 먹어볼 기회가 또 언제 있겠어요!

1503300005.english: Th-then, let's try a sample one by one... Hehe~ I wonder what they taste like~
1503300005.korean: 그, 그럼 하나씩 시식을…&n헤헤~ 대체 어떤 맛일까요~

1503300008.english: Oh? Meropé? Did you come to the tea party to eat cake too?
1503300008.korean: 앗? 메로페 님?&n메로페님도 케이크를 먹으러 다과회에 오셨나요?

1503300009.english: No, I came to pick up Rode. Come on, let's go.
1503300009.korean: 아뇨, 저는 로데를 데리러 왔어요.&n자, 어서 가요.

1503300010.english: What? You came to get me… Ah!? Lady Merope!? W-wait a moment. Please don't pull me~!
1503300010.korean: 네? 저를 데리러 왔다니…&n앗!? 메로페 님!? 잠, 잠깐만요. 잡아 당기지 말아주세요~!

1503300011.english: I haven't even had a chance to try the cakes yet! At least! Just one bite! Please, let me have just one bite!
1503300011.korean: 아직 케이크들을 먹어보지 못했단 말이에요~!&n적어도! 한 입만! 제발 한 입만이라도 먹게 해주세요~~!

1503300012.english: Just one bite! Please, just one bite!

1503300013.english: Stop sleep-talking and wake up now!!

1503300017.english: Are you awake? How long do you plan to sleep?

1503300018.english: Oh no, the cakes! Where did my delicious-looking cakes go?
1503300018.korean: 앗, 케이크들은! 먹음직스러운 제 케이크들은 어디갔죠?

1503300019.english: Are you still sleep-talking? Do you want one more chop to snap you wide awake? I'll make it a bit harder this time.
1503300019.korean: 아직도 잠꼬대를 하는 거예요?&n아예 정신 확 들게 촙 한 대만 더 맞으실래요? 이번에는 좀 더 강하게 해드릴게요.

1503300020.english: Ah, no! I'm fine! I'm awake now! I'm fully awake! So please spare Orca Chop~!
1503300020.korean: 아, 아뇨! 괜찮아요! 이제 깨어났어요! 완전히 정신이 확 들었어요!&n그러니까 범고래 촙은 봐주세요~!

1503300021.english: Oh, looks like you just woke up. From the looks of it, you don't seem to be hurt anywhere, which is a relief.
1503300021.korean: 오, 이제야 일어났나 보네.&n보아하니 어디 다치지는 않은 것 같은데 다행이야.

1503300022.english: Yes…? Ah, um… I mean, Lady Alcyone…? What do you mean? Come to think of it, why did I lose consciousness? Did something happen?
1503300022.korean: 네…? 앗, 저 그러니까 알키오네… 님? 그게 무슨 말씀인가요?&n그러고보니 저는 왜 정신을 잃었죠? 무슨 일이 있었나요?

1503300023.english: Don't you remember? We were on our way back after delivering an AGS infected with Iron Bug to the fleet at the Master's request.
1503300023.korean: 기억나지 않는 거예요?&n주인님의 부탁으로 철충에 감염된 AGS를 함대에 전달하고 다시 돌아가는 길이었잖아요.

1503300024.english: Then, I got caught in a sudden avalanche.
1503300024.korean: 그러던 중 갑자기 발생한 눈사태에 휘말렸고요.

1503300025.english: Avalanche…! Oh, right! That’s right! Whoa… I really thought I was going to die.
1503300025.korean: 눈사태…! 앗, 맞아요! 그랬어요!&n후에엥… 정말 죽는 줄 알았어요.

1503300026.english: Thank you so much, Alcyone. If you hadn't protected us, neither of us would have been safe.
1503300026.korean: 알키오네 언니 정말 고마워.&n언니가 지켜주지 않았으면 우리 둘다 무사하지 못했을 거야.

1503300027.english: It's about protecting our Pleiades' pride and cutie, Merope, so of course! Leave it to me. No matter what happens, I'll protect her.
1503300027.korean: 우리 플레이아데스의 자랑 귀염둥이 메로페를 지키는 건데 당연하지!&n맡겨줘 무슨 일이 있어도 이 언니가 지켜줄 테니까.

1503300029.english: Rode…? Do you have a complaint?

1503300030.english: No! Not at all! There is nothing! Yes! Lord Merope is the serious and dignified person I know!
1503300030.korean: 아뇨! 전혀! 아무 것도 없어요!&n응! 메로페 님은 제가 알고 있는 진지하고 위엄있는 모습이에요!

1503300031.english: Anyway! What do we do now?

1503300032.english: I have finished the task you asked me to do, so I should return to where you are... but actually, I haven't been able to contact you for a while.
1503300032.korean: 주인님이 부탁하신 일은 마쳤으니, 다시 주인님이 있는 곳으로 돌아가는 게 맞겠지만…&n실은 아까부터 주인님과 연락이 안되고 있어요.

1503300033.english: Considering the sudden avalanche... something might have happened where Master is.
1503300033.korean: 갑자기 발생한 눈사태도 그렇고… 어쩌면 주인님이 계시는 곳에 무슨 일이 벌어졌을지도 몰라요.

1503300035.english: It is highly likely that the Iron Bugs swarmed in, just like when they attacked Gamma.
1503300035.korean: 감마 님을 습격했을 때와 마찬가지로 철충들이 몰려왔을 가능성이 높아요.

1503300036.english: Sister Alcyone! Let's hurry back to Poseidon's base! Master might be in danger!
1503300036.korean: 알키오네 언니! 서둘러 포세이돈 기지로 돌아가자!&n주인님이 위험할지도 몰라!

1503300038.english: Sister Alcyone? What's wrong? You keep staring into the distance.
1503300038.korean: 알키오네 언니?&n왜 그래? 먼 곳을 계속 바라보고.

1503300039.english: Huh? No, it's nothing special. I'm not sure if I saw correctly, but over there...
1503300039.korean: 응? 아니, 별건 아니고.&n내가 제대로 본 건지는 모르겠는데 저쪽에 말이야.

1503300040.english: It looks like there is something sticking out on my eye.
1503300040.korean: 뭔가가 눈 위에 튀어나온 뭔가가 있는 것 같아서.

1503300041.english: Something sticking out of the snow…? W-wait! That’s a human leg!!
1503300041.korean: 눈 위에 튀어나온 뭔가…?&n잠, 잠깐! 저건 사람 다리 잖아!!

1503300042.english: It might be an Orca member caught in the avalanche, not us! We have to save them right away!
1503300042.korean: 우리 말고 눈사태에 휘말린 오르카 대원일지도 몰라!&n어서 구해줘야 해!

1503300044.english: Are you okay!? Just hang in there a little longer! I'll get you out of the snow right now!
1503300044.korean: 괜찮아!? 조금만 참아!&n지금 눈 속에서 꺼내줄게!

1503300048.english: Hehehe… Captain Gamma~~ I, Merlin, have been waiting for this very moment. Now, come with Arthur and show me the scenery beyond the utopia…
1503300048.korean: 우헤헤… 감마 대장니임~~ 이 멀린, 이 순간만을 줄곧 기다려 왔습니다.&n자, 어서 아서와 함께 저에게 이상향 저 너머의 풍경을…

1503300049.english: Meropé? What are you doing? Why are you burying it in the snow again? Who on earth was it that you're doing this?
1503300049.korean: 메로페? 뭐하고 있어?&n왜 다시 눈 속에 묻는 거야? 대체 누구였길래 그래?

1503300050.english: It's nothing... Yeah, we didn't see anything...
1503300050.korean: 아무것도 아니야…&n응, 우리는 아무것도 못 본 거야…

1503300051.english: Wow, thank you, Alcyone! If it weren't for you, I, Merlin, would have almost gone to Utopia.
1503300051.korean: 이야~ 감사합니다. 알키오네 님!&n알키오네 님이 아니었다면, 이 멀린 하마터면 이상향으로 갈 뻔했습니다.

1503300052.english: Ah, yeah. It's true that I found you first, but it was Merope who saved you. You should thank Merope. I almost missed it completely.
1503300052.korean: 아, 응. 널 처음 발견한건 내가 맞지만, 구해준 건 우리 메로페야.&n감사 인사는 메로페에게 해. 나는 하마터면 눈치 못채고 넘어갈 뻔했거든.

1503300053.english: Haha, of course! … Thanks for saving me. M. E. R. P.E.
1503300053.korean: 하하, 물론입죠!&n…구해줘서 고맙다. 메. 로. 페.

1503300055.english: So why was Merlin buried in a place like this? Shouldn't he be at Poseidon's base?
1503300055.korean: 그래서 멀린은 왜 이런 곳에 파묻혀 있던 거야?&n포세이돈 기지에 있어야 하지 않아?

1503300056.english: … I was heading to the ship anchored in the sea on the orders of the Captain of the Dance.
1503300056.korean: …나는 무용 대장님의 지시로 바다에 정박해 있는 함선으로 가고 있었어.

1503300057.english: In the meantime, I was completely helpless against the avalanche caused by the Iron Bug.
1503300057.korean: 그러던 중 철충이 일으킨 눈사태에 꼼짝없이 당하고 말았지.

1503300058.english: ...You're saying the Iron Bug caused this avalanche?

1503300059.english: Yeah, no doubt about it. This avalanche was caused by the Iron Bug to hinder me. Cowardly bastards! To think they interfered with the orders Captain Muyong asked me to carry out!
1503300059.korean: 응, 틀림없어. 이 눈사태는 날 방해하기 위해 철충들이 일으킨 눈사태야.&n비겁한 녀석들 내가 무용 대장님에게 부탁받은 지시를 방해하다니!

1503300061.english: Um, um... does that mean... the Iron Bugs attacked again?
1503300061.korean: 저, 저기… 그렇다는 건 역시… 철충들이 또 습격한 건가요?

1503300062.english: … Hmm… If you say the Iron Bugs attacked, then yes, they did attack… but it’s fine, Captain Muyong and the other Orca members would have taken care of them all by now.
1503300062.korean: …음… 철충들이 습격했다고 하면 습격한 게 맞긴 한데…&n괜찮아, 무용 대장님이랑 다른 오르카 대원들이 지금쯤 전부 해치웠을 테니까.

1503300063.english: So, let's hurry to the docked ship.
1503300063.korean: 그러니까, 우리는 어서 정박해 있는 함선으로 가자고.

1503300066.english: Don't try to gloss over it by pretending everything is okay; just tell the truth.
1503300066.korean: 애써 괜찮은 척 얼버무리려고 하지 말고 사실대로 말해.

1503300068.english: It’s no use trying to deceive me. I’ve unintentionally come to know exactly what you’re thinking and how you’re acting.
1503300068.korean: 속이려고 해도 소용없어.&n본의 아니게 당신이 어떤 생각을 가지고 행동하는지 정도는 이제 전부 알고 있으니까.

1503300070.english: Haha... It's not exactly good to face off too often... because they can read all my thoughts, you know...
1503300070.korean: 하하… 너무 자주 대결하는 것도 좋지만은 않네…&n내 생각을 전부 읽히니까 말이야…

1503300071.english: Okay, I'll tell you everything truthfully. … Everything I'm about to say is true.
1503300071.korean: 알았어 사실대로 전부 말할게.&n…지금부터 하는 얘기는 전부 사실이야.

1503300072.english: This is the situation as far as I know it at this point.
1503300072.korean: 이게 현 시점에서 내가 알고 있는 상황이야.

1503300073.english: If that's true, it means we're in a really serious situation right now! If we don't hurry and find Master...!
1503300073.korean: 그게 정말이면 지금 엄청 심각한 상황이라는 거잖아!&n서둘러 주인님을 찾지 않으면…!

1503300075.english: Merope? What's wrong? Shouldn't you be going to find and rescue your master right away?
1503300075.korean: 메로페? 왜그래?&n어서 주인님을 찾아 구조해야하는 거 아니야?

1503300076.english: That is true, but if Merlin is right, we shouldn't make a rash move right now. If we're not careful, we could fall victim to those Iron Bugs as well.
1503300076.korean: 그건 맞지만 멀린의 말이 사실이라면 지금은 섣불리 움직여서는 안 돼.&n자칫하다간 우리까지 그 연결체 철충에게 당할 수도 있어.

1503300077.english: Then what do you want to do? Master might be in danger even at this very moment!
1503300077.korean: 그럼 어떻게 하자는 거야?&n지금 이 순간에도 주인님이 위험할지도 모른다고!

1503300078.english: … By now, the regular contact time has passed, so Orca must have noticed that something happened.
1503300078.korean: …지금쯤이면 정기 연락 시간이 지났으니 오르카도 무슨 일이 일어났다는 걸 눈치챘을 거야.

1503300079.english: In that case, what we need to do now is wait in preparation for when an opportunity comes.
1503300079.korean: 그렇다면 지금 우리가 해야하는 건.&n기회가 찾아왔을 때를 대비해 기다려야해.

1503300080.english: It's okay, Master, you will surely be safe. I trust you.
1503300080.korean: 괜찮아, 주인님은 분명 무사할 테니까.&n나는 주인님을 믿어.

1503300081.english: And Master will surely come up with a solution and take action. Let's wait for that time.
1503300081.korean: 그리고 주인님은 분명 해결책을 생각해내고 행동하실 거야.&n그때를 기다리자.

1503300083.english: I don't know much about strategies or tactics. But I trust you, Master, too.
1503300083.korean: 나는 작전이나 책략 같은건 잘 몰라.&n하지만 나 역시 주인님을 믿고 있어.

1503300084.english: And I trust my cute little sibling just as much! Got it! If you say so, I'll believe you!
1503300084.korean: 그리고 그만큼 우리 귀여운 동생도 믿고 있지!&n알았어! 네가 그렇게 말한다면 난 널 믿을게!

1503300087.english: If my memory serves me right, I believe there was a shortcut to Juno Base. Is that correct?
1503300087.korean: 내 기억이 맞다면 주노 기지로 향하는 지름길이 있었던 걸로 아는데 맞나요?

1503300088.english: Oh, that's right! It exists! But how do you know that, Merope? It was made long before you even existed.
1503300088.korean: 앗, 맞아요! 있어요!&n그런데 메로페 님이 그걸 어떻게 아세요? 메로페 님이 계시기 훨씬 전에 만들어진 건데.

1503300089.english: I just happened to remember seeing it while looking through old files. Could you guide me?
1503300089.korean: 그냥 우연히 예전 자료를 보다가 본 기억이 있었을 뿐이에요.&n안내해 줄 수 있겠어요?

1503300090.english: Yes, that's fine! I'll guide you!

1503300091.english: Then I'll leave it to you. Sister Alcyone…

1503300092.english: Okay! I just need to head quickly to the designated location, right?
1503300092.korean: 오케이! 안내하는 장소로 빠르게 이동해주면 되는 거지?

1503300093.english: Actually, I was secretly looking forward to it when they said I was going to the Northern Front! I mean surfing on the snow... no, snowboarding on the snow instead of the waves.
1503300093.korean: 사실 북부 전선으로 간다고 했을 때 은근 기대를 하고 있었거든!&n파도가 아닌 눈으로 서핑… 아니, 스노우 보드를 타는 걸 말이야.

1503300094.english: Hehe, Alcyone is the best, as expected.

1503300095.english: Huh? I'm not entirely sure, but it seems like things are going well without me... Am I not needed anymore...? Is my role just to pass on information?
1503300095.korean: 어라? 잘은 모르겠지만 나 없이도 일이 잘 흘러가는 분위기인데…&n혹시 나는 이제 필요없는 건가...? 내 역할은 정보 전달이 끝?

1503300096.english: Merlin, what are you doing! Hurry up and climb onto Alcyone's shield!
1503300096.korean: 멀린, 뭐하고 있어!&n어서 알키오네 언니 방패 위에 올라오지 않고!

1503300097.english: Merope… You’re actually a pretty good guy. I’m on my way!
1503300097.korean: 메로페… 너 은근 좋은 녀석이구나.&n지금 갈게!

1503300098.english: Alright! Let's give it a try with the Poseidon team, without Captain Poseidon!
1503300098.korean: 좋아! 어디 포세이돈 대장님 없는 포세이돈 팀으로 한 건 해보자고!

1503300099.english: I'm not part of Poseidon... Anyway, here I go! Wave Rider activated!
1503300099.korean: 나는 포세이돈 소속이 아닌데…&n아무튼 간다! 웨이브 라이더 가동!

1503400002.english: Did you stay up all night again?

1503400003.english: I've told you several times to play games in moderation, haven't I?
1503400003.korean: 제가 게임은 적당히 하시라고 몇 번이나 말씀드렸을 텐데요?

1503400004.english: Ugh! But how am I supposed to sleep with this level and this score?!
1503400004.korean: 우으~! 하지만 이 레벨이랑 이 점수로 어떻게 잠을 자~!

1503400005.english: If I sleep here, the others will overtake me!
1503400005.korean: 내가 여기서 잠을 자면 다른 애들이 치고 올라온다고!

1503400006.english: I absolutely cannot stand seeing that before my eyes close! Anyway, I can't sleep until I achieve my goal!
1503400006.korean: 내 눈이 감기기 전에는 절대 그 꼴은 못 본단 말이야~!&n아무튼 목표를 달성하기 전까지는 절대 못 자!

1503400007.english: Then, couldn't you just have someone else do it while you're sleeping?
1503400007.korean: 그럼, 주무시는 동안 다른 사람에게 시키면 그만이지 않습니까.

1503400008.english: No! This only has meaning if I do it myself! Winning with a character I leveled up through a proxy isn't fun at all! Epsilon must know that, right?
1503400008.korean: 싫어! 이런 건 내 손으로 직접 해야지 의미가 있는 거야!&n대리를 해서 키운 걸로 이겨봤자 전혀 재미없어! 엡실론도 알 거 아니야!

1503400009.english: I have absolutely no idea. Anyway, please get some sleep now.

1503400010.english: The Chairman is visiting tomorrow. Are you planning to show him such a moldy side of yourself?
1503400010.korean: 내일은 회장님이 오시는 날입니다.&n그런 곰팡이 같은 모습을 보여드릴 셈인가요?

1503400012.english: Because my grandfather has absolutely no interest in me…

1503400013.english: He will surely be so engrossed in work tomorrow that he won't care whether I'm there or not.
1503400013.korean: 분명 내일도 회사 일에만 정신이 팔려서 내가 있든 없든 신경 쓰지 않으실 거야.

1503400014.english: Epsilon, are you okay? I heard Grandpa ordered you to do a lot of things.
1503400014.korean: 엡실론이야말로 괜찮아?&n할아버지가 명령하신 일들이 엄청 많다고 들었는데.

1503400015.english: If it were that level of work, I finished it a long time ago.
1503400015.korean: 그 정도의 업무라면 이미 끝낸 지 오래입니다.

1503400016.english: Ahaha, as expected of Secretary Lemonade. Amazing...

1503400020.english: need to get you some sleep, so I will help you play right next to you.
1503400020.korean: 조금이라도 주무시게 해야겠으니 옆에서 플레이하시는 걸 도와드리겠습니다.

1503400021.english: Huh? Ha, but I wasn't planning on being a designated driver…
1503400021.korean: 어? 하, 하지만 나는 대리를 할 생각은…

1503400022.english: I am strictly just there to assist you. If I were doing this together rather than alone, wouldn't that mean I wouldn't be a representative? You could consider it a collaboration.
1503400022.korean: 어디까지나 옆에서 도와드리는 겁니다.&n저 혼자 하는 게 아니라 같이 하는 거라면 대리가 아니지 않을까요? 협력이라 보면 되겠네요.

1503400023.english: … Ehh~ What's the big deal~ Hehe~ But I like it! If Epsilon wants to help that much, I guess it can't be helped!
1503400023.korean: …에이~ 그게 뭐야~&n헤헤~ 그래도 좋아! 엡실론이 그렇게 도와주고 싶다면 어쩔 수 없지!

1503400024.english: That's right! Why don't you start playing the game with Epsilon while you're at it?
1503400024.korean: 그렇지!&n이참에 엡실론도 같이 게임을 시작하는 건 어때?

1503400025.english: This is a brand new game that just came out, so it’s not too late to start! Epsilon is smart, so he’ll definitely be able to catch up!
1503400025.korean: 이 게임은 이번에 나온 신작인데 지금이라면 아직 시작하는데 늦지 않았어!&n엡실론은 똑똑하니까 분명 쫓아올 수 있을 거야!

1503400026.english: No, just helping out from the side is enough for me…
1503400026.korean: 아뇨, 저는 그냥 옆에서 도와드리는 걸로 충분…

1503400027.english: Playing games together is the best way to help me!
1503400027.korean: 같이 게임을 하는 게 제일 나를 도와주는 거야!

1503400028.english: Since I'm a DPS and a Tank, Epsilon can be the Healer! He'll be the one providing support from behind while I fight on the front!
1503400028.korean: 나는 딜러 겸 탱커니까 엡실론은 힐러를 하면 되겠다!&n내가 앞에서 싸우면 뒤에서 지원을 해주는 역할이야!

1503400030.english: Hehehe~ Yeah! I'll do as I please!

1503400033.english: Why are you acting like this?

1503400034.english: I'm saying this out of the blue now, but...

1503400035.english: Is it okay if I call you older sister?

1503400037.english: Actually, I've wanted to have an older sister for a long time...
1503400037.korean: 나 사실 옛날부터 언니가 있었으면 했거든…

1503400038.english: But considering our ages, my older sister isn't me...
1503400038.korean: 하지만 서로의 나이를 생각하면 언니는 제가 아니라…

1503400039.english: Hey! You know! They say a 10-year-old cat is about 50 years old in human years! So I'm the younger sibling, right?
1503400039.korean: 그! 왜! 고양이는 10살이 사람 나이로 50살 정도라고 하잖아!&n그러니까 내가 동생이 맞지!

1503400040.english: I am not a cat, but... and I would appreciate it if you didn't subtly make my age 50. Even I get a little hurt.
1503400040.korean: 저는 고양이가 아닙니다만… 그리고 은근슬쩍 제 나이를 50살로 하지 말아주셨으면 합니다.&n아무리 저라도 조금 상처받습니다.

1503400041.english: Hehehe, sorry… So, are you okay?

1503400042.english: … Well, if it’s just a request like that, I don’t mind, but…

1503400044.english: … Alright then, let's get started, Miss.

1503400045.english: Ahaha! Epsilon, were you feeling shy just now? And since I'm your younger sister now, it's okay to speak freely! And if possible…
1503400045.korean: 아하하! 엡실론 언니 지금 부끄러워한 거야?&n그리고 이제 내가 동생이니까 편히 말해도 괜찮아! 그리고 가능하면…

1503400046.english: I wish you would call me by my name…

1503400047.english: Phew... I might have ended up creating a ridiculous younger sibling...
1503400047.korean: 후… 저는 터무니 없는 동생을 만들고 만 걸지도 모르겠군요…

1503400048.english: Alright then, let's start the game.

1503400052.english: Ugh~! So noisy… I was finally getting some good sleep, what is this…
1503400052.korean: 우응~! 시끄러워…&n모처럼 기분 좋게 자고 있는데 뭐야…

1503400054.english: If you're sleeping, you should at least make it obvious you're asleep.
1503400054.korean: 자고 있으면 자는 티라도 내야 할 거 아니야.

1503400055.english: Since the power is off and there isn't even a sound of breathing, how am I supposed to know if he's dead or alive?
1503400055.korean: 숨소리도 없이 전원이 꺼져 있으니까 죽었는지 살았는지 알 수가 있어야지.

1503400056.english: But does it sleep even in that drone state?
1503400056.korean: 그런데 그 드론인 상태로도 잠을 자는 거야?

1503400057.english: Yawn~ Well, I guess so... It was literally my first sleep in 172 hours.

1503400058.english: What, 172 hours? I'm not exactly the type to sleep much myself, but you're something else...
1503400058.korean: 뭣, 172시간?&n나도 그다지 자는 편은 아니지만, 너도 어지간하구나…

1503400059.english: What on earth were you doing to stay up all this time? Were you constantly investigating Zeta?
1503400059.korean: 대체 뭘 하길래 그렇게 지금까지 안 자고 있었던 거야?&n계속 제타와 관련해서 조사하고 있었나?

1503400060.english: No, actually, I recently discovered a new pre-apocalyptic game that was so much fun. I stayed up all night playing it...
1503400060.korean: 아니, 얼마 전에 새로 발견한 멸망 전의 게임이 너무 재미있어서.&n철야로 플레이했어…

1503400062.english: I'm on my third playthrough right now and it's seriously an amazing game... Shepard, want to try it together?
1503400062.korean: 지금 3회차 플레이 중인데 정말 갓겜이야…&n셰퍼드 너도 같이해볼래?

1503400063.english: ...I'm fine. It's not that I dislike games, but... if you get the chance next time, please invite me then.
1503400063.korean: ...난 됐어.&n게임을 싫어하는 건 아니지만… 다음에 기회가 있다면 그때 다시 권유해 줘.

1503400065.english: So? Did you have a good dream?

1503400066.english: … I just had a nostalgic dream about the past. It’s a truly cherished memory…
1503400066.korean: …그냥 옛날의 그리운 꿈을 꿨어.&n정말 그리운 기억이야…

1503400067.english: Hmm? What kind of memory is it that makes you act like that?

1503400068.english: It's the memory that became the catalyst for me becoming a game addict. Want to hear it?
1503400068.korean: 내가 게임 중독자로 거듭난 계기가 되는 기억이지.&n들어볼래?

1503400070.english: Now, we're about to reach the point you mentioned.
1503400070.korean: 자, 이제 슬슬 네가 말한 지점에 도착할 거야.

1503400071.english: It means our long, long journey has finally reached its destination.
1503400071.korean: 우리의 이 길고 길었던 여정도 이제 종착지까지 왔다는 거지.

1503400073.english: What the heck... that's embarrassing... that's not something you should be saying now.
1503400073.korean: 뭐야 갑자기… 낯부끄럽게…&n이제 와서 할 소리는 아니잖아.

1503400074.english: I just came to see what Zeta is plotting. There is no guarantee that I can get your body back.
1503400074.korean: 난 그저 제타가 뭘 꾸미는 건지 보러왔을 뿐이야.&n네 몸을 되찾을 수 있다는 보장도 없고.

1503400075.english: Say your thanks after you've recovered.
1503400075.korean: 감사의 말은 몸을 되찾고 나서 해.

1503400077.english: Hahaha, leave it to me. I'm confident in giving orders.
1503400077.korean: 후후후, 맡겨줘.&n지시를 내리는 건 자신 있으니까.

1503400078.english: I’ll show you the power of the strategist of the party that once held the record for the shortest clear time for every notorious top-tier raid!
1503400078.korean: 한때 악명 높은 모든 최상위 레이드를, 최단 시간 클리어로 기록한 파티의 참모인 내 힘을 보여주지!

1503500002.english: To think there would be a passage like this deep at the bottom of the lake. Is this the hidden Zeta factory you were talking about?
1503500002.korean: 호수 밑바닥 깊숙한 곳에 이런 통로가 있을 줄이야.&n여기가 네가 말한 제타의 숨겨진 공장이야?

1503500003.english: Ugh... Water is scary after all... If it weren't for the drone's body, I would have drowned...
1503500003.korean: 으으… 역시 물은 무서워… 드론의 몸이 아니었으면 익사했을 거야…

1503500004.english: Shepherd, you really swim well... I can't swim... Is it because I'm a dog?
1503500004.korean: 셰퍼드 너 잘도 헤엄치는 구나…&n난 수영 못하는데… 역시 개라서 그런가?

1503500005.english: Is that something you should say to me, who swam dozens of meters carrying you? If it's a drone's body, surely it must have at least some diving capability.
1503500005.korean: 그게 너를 짊어지고 수십미터를 헤엄친 나에게 할 소리야?&n드론의 몸이면 잠항 기능 정도는 있을 거 아니야.

1503500006.english: It's not that I don't have diving capabilities... but you know... I guess you could say it's mentally and instinctively too much for me... I go into a panic state as soon as I get underwater...
1503500006.korean: 잠항 기능이 없는 건 아닌데… 그 왜 있잖아…&n정신적으로 본능적으로 무리라고 할까… 물속에만 들어가면 패닉 상태가 되거든…

1503500007.english: If it's a Lemonade entity, at least input the swimming module...
1503500007.korean: 레모네이드 개체라면 수영 모듈 정도는 입력하라고…

1503500008.english: I didn't include that because I thought I would never have a reason to swim.
1503500008.korean: 수영할 일이 절대 없을 거라 생각해서 그런 건 안 들어가 있어.

1503500009.english: Does it really matter... So what? Is this the Zeta factory you were talking about?
1503500009.korean: 아무래도 좋나…&n그래서? 여기가 네가 말한 제타의 공장이 맞아?

1503500010.english: No, Zeta's factory is 40km away from here. Besides, that is just the distance to the outskirts, and considering the target destination, we still have another 41km to go.
1503500010.korean: 아니, 제타의 공장은 여기서 40km는 떨어져 있어.&n게다가 이건 어디까지나 외곽까지의 거리고, 목표 지점을 생각하면 앞으로 41km는 더 가야 해.

1503500012.english: If it's still that far, we could have just traveled further in a Humvee!
1503500012.korean: 아직 그렇게 멀다면 험비로 더 이동해도 괜찮았잖아!

1503500013.english: This is the only way to get to Zeta's factory without being detected... I've tried every other nearby path...
1503500013.korean: 이 길이 제타의 공장으로 들키지 않고 갈 수 있는 유일한 통로인걸…&n가까운 다른 길은 전부 시도해 봤단 말이야…

1503500014.english: Sigh... I guess I can't help it since I've already come this far. Should I just consider it a walk... even though the scenery is terrible...
1503500014.korean: 하아… 이미 여기까지 와버렸으니 어쩔 수 없나.&n그냥 산책 좀 한다고 생각할까… 경치는 최악이지만…

1503500018.english: You said we don't have time, so let's hurry. But why is it so noisy here? It sounds like some kind of machine is running...
1503500018.korean: 시간이 없다고 했으니 그러면 서두르자고.&n그런데 여기 왜 이렇게 시끄러운 거야? 뭔가 기계 같은 게 돌아가고 있는 것 같은데…

1503500019.english: Anyway, looking around roughly, it looks like I have to go through that door. Am I right?
1503500019.korean: 아무튼, 대충 둘러보니 저 문을 지나가야 하는 것 같은데 맞아?

1503500022.english: I can't open it. Shepherd, you have to open it.
1503500022.korean: 난 못 열어.&n셰퍼드 네가 열어줘야 해.

1503500025.english: Ah, I get what you mean. Is there some way to open the door? Okay, tell me.
1503500025.korean: 아~ 무슨 뜻인지 알겠어.&n문을 여는 무슨 방법이 있는 거지? 좋아, 알려줘.

1503500026.english: No, there is no way to open this door from the outside. It is designed to be opened only from the inside.
1503500026.korean: 아니, 이 문은 외부에서 열 방법은 없어.&n반드시 내부에서만 열리도록 설계가 되어 있거든.

1503500028.english: No, then what am I supposed to do? The only other entrance is that gap over there—barely big enough for one person to squeeze through. Are you telling me to go in there?
1503500028.korean: 아니, 그럼 나보고 어쩌란 건데?&n다른 입구라고는 저기 보이는 사람 한 명 겨우 들어갈 만한 틈 정도인데 저기로 들어가란 거야?

1503500029.english: That's right. At the end of that gap, it leads to the room on the opposite side of this door. Shepard, you just need to go through the gap and open this door.
